1 A. LET US BE HUMAN - WORTHY OF OUR INTELLECTUALS EVOLUTION

THE RELIGION OF THE FUTURE WILL BE A

COSMIC RELIGION. IT SHOULD TRANSCEND

A PERSONAL GOD AND AVOID DOGMAS AND

THEOLOGY. COVERING BOTH THE NATURAL AND

THE SPIRITUAL, IT SHOULD BE BASED ON A

RELIGIOUS SENSE ARISING PROM THE EXPERIENCE

OF ALL THINGS, NATURAL AND SPIRITUAL,

AS A MEANINGFUL ENTITY."

MANY HUMANS (UNLIKE ANIMALS) AT ONE TIME OR ANOTHER, SEEK

SUPERNATURAL ASSISTANCE - OVERTLY OR COVERTLY. THIS IS NORMAL.

WHAT IS ABNORMAL AND DEROGATORY, IS TO MASK ONE'S INTELLECT IN SO DOING:

TO "PRAISE THE LORD," WHO CREATED INTELLECT! THIS IS STRANGE. BUT,

LIKE MOST THINGS, THE SOLUTION TO THIS TOO IS BASICALLY

SIMPLE AND THROUGHOUT RATIONAL: A FORMULA FOR HAPPY LIVING OR THE FUTURE COSMIC RELIGION (COMMENTARY) I

TRUE FAITH IS A TRUST, WITH WHICH ONE REASONS THE UNKNOWN; AND, IT IS

NOT JUST DEFENDING DOGMA, BY UNREASONING THE UNKNOWN! (COMMENTARY II)

THE COSMIC (COMMON SENSE) RELIGION *(1) THE SAME SUPERIOR RIGHTEOUS POWER
*(1) 1. WHAT ONE LIKES AND DISLIKES (RATIONALLY) SHOULD CONFORM TOO PERFECTLY WITH WHAT IS RIGHT AND WRONG (NATURALLY). THAT WAS RESPONSIBLE FOR THE MIRACLES OF JESUS AND MOHAMMED, WOULD MAINTAIN THE EFFECTS OF THE COSMIC RELIGION TOO. (AS THE BASIC TENETS OF CHRISTIANITY AND ISLAM PROVIDE THE RATIONALLY ASSESSED VALUES - FOR RIGHT LIVING.)
  1. IMMEDIATE REWARD (OR REPRISAL) FOR
RIGHT (OR WRONG) LIVING; AS A ROUTINE ASSISTANCE (OR RESISTANCE) TO ONE'S EFFORT.
  1. THE ASSURANCE OF ULTIMATE WELFARE (AS A GOAL). ULTIMATE WELFARE MEANS THE ABILITY TO FIX ONE'S HEREAFTER AS ONE SEEKS IT. FOR THIS, ONE MUST BE TRUE TO ONESELF. AS THE
REQUIREMENT IS A SELF REALIZATION (NOT ONE OF DOING GOOD) AND THIS CAN OCCUR ONLY WITHIN ONE SELF AND BE BROUGHT ON ONLY BY ONE SELF.A SUPERIOR RIGHTEOUS POWER CAN ONLY HELP.  HENCE ITS / THEIR DISCREETNESS - TO AVOID BELIEF. (COMMENTARY) III COMMON SENSE AND CONSCIENCE COMMON SENSE IS THE BASICS OF ONE'S CONSCIENCE OR DICTATES OF RIGHT AND WRONG; WHICH SHOULD THUS BE COMMON, OR THE SAME, FOR EVERY HUMAN BEING? AND MUST RESULT IN A COSMIC, COMMON SENSE RELIGION THAT IS REASONABLE TO LESSER EVOLVED BEING AS WELL; NOT JUST SATISFYING HUMANS ONLY. (COMMENTARY) IV A CHICKEN WOULD NOT LIKE TO BE KILLED. BUT IF IT HAD TO, IT WOULD LIKE TO LEAD A NORMAL LIFE AND DIE IN THE MOST HUMANE (PAIN FREE) MANNER. A BACTERIUM TOO WOULD LIKE TO LIVE. SO WE TRY TO DESTROY ONLY THE HARMFUL ONES.   1 B. EINSTEIN * "MY SCIENTIFIC WORK IS MOTIVATED BY AN IRRESISTIBLE LONGING TO UNDERSTAND THE SECRETS OF NATURAL AND BY NO OTHER FEELINGS." *(1) “EVERYONE WHO IS SERIOUSLY INVOLVED IN THE PURSUIT OF SCIENCE BECOMES CONVINCED THAT A "SPIRIT" IS MANIFEST IN THE LAWS OF THE UNIVERSE" *(2) A "SPIRIT" VASTLY SUPERIOR TO THAT OF MAN (*3) AND ONE IN THE FACE OF WHICH WE WITH OUR MODEST POWERS MUST FEEL HUMBLE." (EINSTEIN) (*1) - ONE CANNOT ASPIRE ANY GREATER, IN THE UTILIZATION OF HUMAN INTELLECT. FOR IT WAS SIMILAR ASPIRATION THAT LEAD THE BUDDHA, THEN, TO THE DISCOVERY OF REALITY, OR "THAT WHICH UNDERLIES APPEARANCES," ON A BACKDROP OF THE INFINITY ON TIME AND SPACE. THE "SECRETS OF NATURE" HAVE NOT CHANGED, SINCE THE BUDDHA DISCOVERED THEM. AND, IF EINSTEIN HAD DECIDED ON THE PRINCIPLES OF THE ENTIRETY, BEFORE ATTEMPTING TO ANALYSE THE ULTIMATE DETAILS OF A PARTICULAR ENTITY; HE WOULD HAVE BEEN EVEN MORE SUCCESSFUL IN FINDING THE "SECRETS OF NATURE" - OR REALITY. ACTUALLY, THIS IS AN ABSOLUTE ESSENTIAL IN THE PURSUIT OF REALITY: UNIFORM GROWTH IN ALL DIRECTIONS. (THE BUDDHA'S DISCOVERY OF REALITY WAS A LOOSE CONGLOMERATE - FOR A SPECIFIC PURPOSE. WE HAVE TO FIX THIS DISCOVERY INTO SCIENTIFIC PRINCIPLES OF METAPHYSICS. (*2) -  THIS 'SPIRIT' OR POWER MUST BE CAPABLE OF KNOWING THE PURPOSE OF THE COSMIC PROCESS. AND WE COULD CONSIDER IT THEM AS THE GUARDIANS OF THE NATURAL LAWS. A 'SPIRIT' THAT IS NOT INSCRUTABLE, BUT A NON MATERIAL RIGHTEOUS (IT HAS TO BE JUST) POWER; WHICH NEEDS TO BE UNDERSTOOD, PARTICULARLY ABOUT ITS DISCREETNESS. TO MAKE THIS RIGHTEOUS POWER AN ALMIGHTY, FREE - WILLED GOVERNOR, IS TO MAKE THE NATURAL LAWS CHANGEABLE (TAIL WAGGING THE DOG) AND MEANINGLESS. BUT TO CONSIDER EVEN A MIGHTY RIGHTEOUS POWER (WITHIN THE NATURAL LAWS) WE SHOULD, AT LEAST, BE ABLE TO JUSTIFY THE MASSACRE OF 1/4 MILLION, INNOCENT RWANDANS, IN 1994. THE ONLY ACCEPTABLE RATIONALLY PERMITTING SUCH A HORRENDOUS GENOCIDE IS TO PROVE THAT WITHOUT TRUE VALUES (OF COMPASSION AND CONTENTMENT) THERE CAN BE NO JUSTICE, NO SOLUTIONS. (MANY NON SCIENTISTS ARE UNEASY OVER THE CONCEPT OF NATURAL LAWS, THOUGH THEY READILY ACCEPT A NATURAL RIGHT AND WRONG OR JUSTICE. BUT SUCH JUSTICE TOO HAS TO BE DETERMINED BY THE NATURAL LAWS, TO BE DIRECTED BY A SUPERIOR RIGHTEOUS POWER ALL OF WHICH MUST BE RATIONAL AND COMPREHENSIBLE BY DEDUCTIVE REASONING. OTHERWISE, NOTHING COULD HAVE ANY MEANING.) * NO BEING CAN BE SUPERNATURAL IF ENCUMBERED WITH A PERSISTENTLY DEMANDING BODY. THE CONCISE OXFORD DICTIONARY DEFINES THE TERM ‘SPIRIT’ AS 'A RATIONAL BEING WITHOUT A BODY'. AND EINSTEIN MUST MEAN IT AS SUCH: A SPIRIT THAT MAKES NATURE MEANINGFUL! (SO, EINSTEIN SEEMS TO HAVE CLARIFIED WHAT THE BRAHMIN PHILOSOPHERS SANKARA VAGUELY ATTEMPTED TO EXPOUND IN THE 8TH CENTURY A.D...) COMMENTARY III   1 C. WITH DEATH OF EINSTEIN, SCIENCE TOOK OFF AT A TANGENT. THINKING BECAME SO STEREOTYPED THAT TRUE VALUES GOT CONFINED TO THE APPARENT. NO ONE CARED TO UNDERSTAND THE NATURE - JUST USE AND PRESERVE IT. TECHNOLOGY *(1) SOON BECAME THE NAME OF THE GAME; AND SPREAD TO EVERY SPHERE OF ACTIVITY - EVEN HEALTH. THE THREAT POSED BY MICRO - ORGANISMS SEEMED SO REMOTE. ALL THIS WAS FOR THE CAUSE OF THE BODY. THE HUMAN MIND REMAINED PHRASEOLOGY. . ONLY MATTER MATTERED NOW. THE 'SPIRIT' GOT LOST WITH EINSTEIN. AGNOSTICS WERE ELITIST. IF WE HAVE TO DISTORT AND PERVERT THINKING INTO SURREALISM, EVEN TO  GET JOY FROM THE SENSES THEN WE HAVE REACHED THE END OF THE ROAD FOR APPARENT, BY OBSCURING THAT TO THE REAL. THE MUSIC OF MICHAEL JACKSON AND THE PAINTING OF PABLO PICASSO DEMONSTRATE THIS PRINCIPLE WELL. PICASSO COULD, AT LEAST, BE CONSIDERED ECCENTRIC. BUT MICHAEL JACKSON EPITOME (ZES DECADENCE.) *(1) - IF SCIENCE IS NATURE; THEN TECHNOLOGY IS SCIENCE WITHOUT FEELING, OR NATURE WITHOUT MEANING   1 .D ONE CAN PUT UP WITH THE ANXIETY OF NOT KNOWING FUTURE EVENTS. BUT IT IS UNCERTAINTY OF NOT KNOWING ANYTHING ABOUT THE PATTERN OF THINGS, OR WHAT THE FUTURE HOLDS, THAT MAKES LIFE TRULY. UNSETTLING, AND LEADS TO DIFFERENT GROPING. IT WAS SUCH DIFFERENT GROPING THAT EVENTUALLY LEAD TO THE SUICIDE OF 39 MEMBERS OF THE HEAVENS GATE CULT IN SOUTH CALIFORNIA, ON 27-3-97; TO REACH AN ELEVATED PLANE OF EXISTENCE - IN SPACE. AND IT HAS TO BE THE SAME GROPING WHICH CAUSED THE DEATH OF 15 STUDENTS OF COLUMBINE HIGH SCHOOL, LITTLETON COLORADO, AT THE HANDS OF A CONFUSED STUDENT GANG, ON 20-4-3-99. DIFFERENT GROUPING IS NOT ALWAYS AS OBVIOUS AS IN THE HEAVENS'S GATE CULT. BUT UNTIL COMPASSION AND CONTENTMENT ARE ESTABLISHED AS TRUE VALUES OF COMMON SENSES, THERE WILL ALWAYS BE SOME DIFFERENT GROPING. (CONTENTMENT IS NOT RELUCTANT RESIGNATION, BUT A RATIONAL RESTRAINT; TO PURSUE THE HIGHER IDEAL OF TRUE LEARNING. FOR THOSE WHO ARE NOT READY FOR TRUE LEARNING, INGRAINING CONTENTMENT WILL MAINTAIN THE PREREQUISITE - EVEN IN THE HEREAFTER, IF JESUS AND MOHAMMED HAD STRESSED THE IMPORTANCE OF SUCH VALUES, INSTEAD OF A HEAVEN AND HELL, THINGS COULD WELL HAVE BEEN DIFFERENT.

What is Lorem Ipsum?

Lorem Ipsum is simply dummy text of the printing and typesetting industry. Lorem Ipsum has been the industry's standard dummy text ever since the 1500s, when an unknown printer took a galley of type and scrambled it to make a type specimen book. It has survived not only five centuries, but also the leap into electronic typesetting, remaining essentially unchanged. It was popularised in the 1960s with the release of Letraset sheets containing Lorem Ipsum passages, and more recently with desktop publishing software like Aldus PageMaker including versions of Lorem Ipsum.

Why do we use it?

It is a long established fact that a reader will be distracted by the readable content of a page when looking at its layout. The point of using Lorem Ipsum is that it has a more-or-less normal distribution of letters, as opposed to using 'Content here, content here', making it look like readable English. Many desktop publishing packages and web page editors now use Lorem Ipsum as their default model text, and a search for 'lorem ipsum' will uncover many web sites still in their infancy. Various versions have evolved over the years, sometimes by accident, sometimes on purpose (injected humour and the like).

Where does it come from?

Contrary to popular belief, Lorem Ipsum is not simply random text. It has roots in a piece of classical Latin literature from 45 BC, making it over 2000 years old. Richard McClintock, a Latin professor at Hampden-Sydney College in Virginia, looked up one of the more obscure Latin words, consectetur, from a Lorem Ipsum passage, and going through the cites of the word in classical literature, discovered the undoubtable source. Lorem Ipsum comes from sections 1.10.32 and 1.10.33 of "de Finibus Bonorum et Malorum" (The Extremes of Good and Evil) by Cicero, written in 45 BC. This book is a treatise on the theory of ethics, very popular during the Renaissance. The first line of Lorem Ipsum, "Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet..", comes from a line in section 1.10.32. The standard chunk of Lorem Ipsum used since the 1500s is reproduced below for those interested. Sections 1.10.32 and 1.10.33 from "de Finibus Bonorum et Malorum" by Cicero are also reproduced in their exact original form, accompanied by English versions from the 1914 translation by H. Rackham.

Where can I get some?

There are many variations of passages of Lorem Ipsum available, but the majority have suffered alteration in some form, by injected humour, or randomised words which don't look even slightly believable. If you are going to use a passage of Lorem Ipsum, you need to be sure there isn't anything embarrassing hidden in the middle of text. All the Lorem Ipsum generators on the Internet tend to repeat predefined chunks as necessary, making this the first true generator on the Internet. It uses a dictionary of over 200 Latin words, combined with a handful of model sentence structures, to generate Lorem Ipsum which looks reasonable. The generated Lorem Ipsum is therefore always free from repetition, injected humour, or non-characteristic words etc.

1. "SOMETHING ON THE OTHER SIDE" BE OBSCURED BY TECHNOLOGY

  2 A. "LIKE THE EUROPEANS OF THE FIFTEENTH CENTURY WE ARE STANDING ON THE SHORES OF SPAIN OR PORTUGAL LOOKING OUT ACROSS THE ATLANTIC. WE KNOW THAT THERE IS SOMETHING ON THE OTHER SIDE AND THAT OUR DISCOVERY OF EXACTLY WHAT THIS IS WILL MEAN THAT THE THINGS IN OUR WORLD WILL NEVER BE THE SAME AGAIN" TIME - JANUARY 14'' 1974 THE DISCOVERY IS THE MEANING OF LIFE (ALL LIFE) AND THE MEANING TO LIFE (ANY LIFE). DISCOVERY IS BY A PROCESS OF SYSTEMATIC ANALYSIS AND SYNTHESIS, OR A TRUE SCIENTIFIC SCRUTINY. THE  ONLY  PREMISE  IS  I AM; TO  DISCOVER  HOW I AM AND WHY I AM . (COMMENTARY I). ALL THIS CAN BE ACHIEVED WITH RELATIVE EASE AND EFFICIENCY IF BILL CLINTON'S PRIME, POST ELECTION OBJECTIVE IS ACCEPTED: THAT "EACH PERSON TAKES CHARGE OF HIS LIFE, WITH THE COURAGE TO CHANGE". THERE IS NOTHING BETTER. (THE QUOTE IS FROM CNN - 27 - 10 - 1992) MIKHAIL GORBACHEV'S WORKING PRINCIPLES OF 'GLASNOST' (OPENNESS) AND 'PERESTROIKA' (CHANGE) ARE EQUALLY RELEVANT - THOUGH MORE GENERAL. (COMMENTARY II)   2 B MANY INTELLIGENT PEOPLE BELIEVE THAT LIFE IS ONE - THIS ONE! (THEY JUST COME FROM NOWHERE, 'PLAY THEIR PART' AND DISAPPEAR AGAIN.) THEY DO NOT UNDERSTAND THIS, AS THEY DO NOT KNOW WHAT LIFE (BEING A BEING) IS. ALL THEY KNOW IS THAT LIFE IS SOMETHING IS THAT IS ASSOCIATED WITH A BODY. OUR QUEST (OF REALITY) STARTS HERE, IS CONTINUED INTO EXISTENCE (LIVING) AND THEN, PERHAPS - A GOAL TOO!   2 .C 1 “I HAVE ABSOLUTELY NO FEARS ABOUT DYING, AS I KNOW THAT LIFE WILL CONTINUE. MY ONLY FEAR IS THAT OF WASTING TIME." (SIR ANTHONY HOPKINS IN A B.B.C. INTERVIEW IN 1995) WHAT HE MUST MEAN IS THAT THE SUPPOSITION THAT ONE CAN ACQUIRE ANOTHER BODY IN THE WAY ONE ACQUIRED THE PRESENT ONE IS FAR MORE RATIONAL THAN THE IDEA OF DISAPPEARING INTO NOTHINGNESS OR BEING CARRIED TO HEAVEN OR HELL! BUT HE IS UNCERTAIN ABOUT THE WAY TO BETTER HIM SELF. WHAT IS VERY IMPORTANT IS THAT HE WAS DRAWN A DISTINCTION BETWEEN HIMSELF AND HIS BODY. WHEN ONE CONSIDERS   2 .C 2 WHEN ONE CONSIDERS THE PHYSICAL APPEARANCE BETWEEN THE MOST ADVANCED APE AND THE MOST PRIMITIVE HUMAN, THERE APPEARS TO BE LITTLE DIFFERENCE BETWEEN THE TWO. HOW EVER, THE ACTUAL DIFFERENCES ARE VAST. TO START WITH, THEY BELONG TO TWO DIFFERENT SPECIES; WHERE CROSS FERTILIZATION IS IMPOSSIBLE. BUT MOST IMPORTANTLY, THE HUMAN HAS THE INTELLECTUAL CAPACITY (TO LEARN) TO COMPREHEND REALITY; AND APE DOES NOT!   2 .D 1 IF I WERE TO BE CREATED BY AN ALMIGHTY, TO LIVE OUT THREE SCORE YEARS AND TEN, ACCORDING TO HIS WILL, ON EARTH; IN RETURN FOR AN ETERNAL, BLISSFUL EXISTENCE THEREAFTER; I WOULD BE AN IMBECILE NOT TO OBLIGE! BUT ALAS, THIS IS ONLY A FERTILE IMAGINATION. AS A RELIGION BASED ON MIRACLES PROVES NOTHING EXCEPT FOR THE POWER TO PRODUCE THEM. YET THE CONCEPT THAT BODILY DEATH WOULD BE THE END OF IT ALL - A SORT OF NOTHINGNESS - WOULD ALSO MAKE LIFE TOTALLY PURPOSELESS. FOR IT WOULD MEAN, THAT ONE HAS APPEARED FROM NOWHERE (IN INFINITY) TO RETURN TO OBLIVION. (Dr. S.P.DE .SILVA.)  
  1. D2.
THE DEVELOPMENT OF THE HUMAN EGG (OR ANY OTHER EGG OR EVEN A SEED) FOLLOWS THE PATTERN OF EVOLUTION OF ITS SPECIES. THIS IS DUE TO THE FACT THAT GENES HAVE MAINTAINED A CONTINUITY (OF THE SPECIES); WITH THE OLD GENES NOT BEING DISCARDED, BUT ALTERED, AND NEW ONES ADDED, WHERE NECESSARY. THUS IT MAKES THE EVOLUTION OF EACH SPECIES A FAMILY TREE. TO POSTULATE THAT WE, AS INDIVIDUALS, ARE JUST ORGANIC CREATIONS*(1) THAT JOIN THE SPECIES ONLY TO DISAPPEAR AT DEATH; IS TOO FANCIFUL EVEN FOR FICTION. A PROCESS OF CONTINUITY OF THE INDIVIDUAL HAS TO BE FOR THERE HAS TO BEA BASIC GROUP OF INDIVIDUALS THAT BRINGS ABOUT THE GENETIC EVOLUTION OF THEIR SPECIES*(3). THE AGNOSTICS*(2) SHOULD NOW BLUSH, AS MATERIAL EVOLUTION HAS SHOWN THE INEVITABILITY OF A MENTAL FACTOR - OR A MIND CONTINUUM! *(1) - JUST ORGANIC CREATIONS' MEANS: SIMPLY THE PRODUCTS OF OUR PARENTS BODIES *(2) - BY PROCREATING ONE MAINTAINS A CONTINUITY OF THE SPECIES, AND (INSTINCTIVELY) PROVIDES A FUTURE NIDUS FOR ONE'S OWN SELF (MIND). *(3) - AN AGNOSTIC IS ONLY INTERESTED IN WHAT CAN BE SEEN, AND NOT IN WHAT COULD BE SEEN - IN REALITY. APPENDIX 2 .D 2 THE MANNER IN WHICH THE GENES IN A FERTILIZED EGG CONSTRUCT A BODY, CAN BE COMPARED TO THE MANNER IN WHICH AN ELABORATE HOUSE IS BUILT. THE DIFFERENCE IS THAT THE HOUSE (OR BODY) ACTUALLY CONSISTS OF A SERIES OF HOUSES; EACH BEING AN EXTENSION OF ITS PREVIOUS UNIT; WITH THE ORIGINAL BEING A SIMPLE FUNCTIONAL UNIT. THE ANALOGY IS IN FACT APPLICABLE TO THE CELL: SINCE IT IS THE CELL THAT UNDERGOES THE MOULDING. THE GENE CONTROLLING AN    ADULT CELL IS RESPONSIBLE ONLY FOR ITS FUNCTION. ITS STRUCTURE HAS BEEN BUILT UP BY A RELAY OF GENES. THERE IS A VAST DIFFERENCE BETWEEN REPRODUCING CELLS AND CONSTRUCTING AN ORGAN. FOR IF AN ADULT CELL HAS TO MULTIPLY, IT MAY DO SO WITHOUT MOULDING*(1) - A FILLING TO REPLACE DEAD TISSUE. THIS IS THE BASIS OF TISSUE CULTURE; WHICH CAN ONLY GROW TISSUES BUT NOT ORGANS*(2). IT IS MOULDING DIFFICULTIES THAT PREVENT THE VITAL (HUMAN) ORGANS BEING REPLACED LIKE THE BRANCHES OF A TREE *(3). THE ANALOGY TO A HOUSE GETS LOST HERE! (OF ALL THE GENES INVOLVED IN CONSTRUCTING A HUMAN BODY , THE GENE OF THE RED BLOOD CELLS IS PERHAPS THE ONLY ONE THAT IS OBVIOUSLY ACTIVE THROUGH OUT LIFE; ENABLING IT TO BE USED AS CELL TRANS PLANTS FOR DISEASES OF RED CELLS) *(1) - THERE HAS TO BE A SPECIFIC GENE FOR SUCH MITOTIC MULTIPLICATION, IN EVERY LIVING BEING. AND, IT IS AN OBSTRUCTION TO THIS GENE THAT IS RESPONSIBLE FOR NEARLY ALL CANCERS; BY AN UNLIMITED PROLIFERATION OF IMMATURE CELLS \, UNABLE TO REACH THE NEXT (MATURATION) STAGE. (THE FEW CANCERS NOT CASED BY A MITOTIC OBSTRUCTION, WOULD BE FROM A GROWING ORGAN TISSUE, LIKE LEUKEMIA) *(2) - ALTHOUGH IT IS UNLIKELY THAT TISSUE CULTURE WILL EVER PRODUCE AN ORGAN, IT MAY BE ABLE TO PRODUCE AN ORGANISM. THIS COULD OCCUR ONLY IF THERE IS SPECIFIC ASEXUAL GENE PRESENT (AS IN PLANTS) WHICH CAN SOMEHOW BE ACTIVATED IN VITRO. (ONLY AN ASEXUAL GENE CAN INTEGRATE THE REST OF THE GENES, TO CONSTRUCT AN ASEXUAL BODY OR CLONE.) *(3) -  IT CAN BE STATED EMPHATICALLY, THAT TISSUE CULTURE (IN VITRO) WILL NEVER BE ABLE TO PRODUCE VITAL HUMAN ORGANS  LIKE THE HEART, LIVER OR KIDNEYS. A STUDY OF EMBRYOLOGY WILL INDICATE THE EXTENT OF GENETIC MOULDING OF THE ENTIRE FOETUS REQUIRED, TO BRING ABOUT ANY SPECIFIC MOULDING OF THESE ORGANS. THE HARELIP IN HUMANS SHOWS THE PRECISE GENETIC MOULDING AND COORDINATION OF THE ENTIRETY NECESSARY IN CONSTRUCTING AN ENTITY .HOWEVER, A HUMAN NAIL (FINGER OR TOE) CAN REGENERATE AS SIMPLY AS THE BRANCH OF A TREE. THIS IS BECAUSE BOTH THE NAIL AND THE BRANCH HAVE NO CONSTRAINTS OF EXTERNAL MOULDING, AND APE ABLE TO GROW INDEPENDENTLY. EVEN SO, A NAIL COULD BE GROWN IN VITRO, ONLY FROM THE GENE ACTIVATED TISSUE OF A NAIL - BED. SINCE THE EXACT CONDITIONS FOR GENETIC ACTIVATION IN VIVO CAN NEVER BE SIMULATED IN TISSUE CULTURE OR IN VITRO.

1. LET''S UNDERSTAND SCIENCE THE EINSTEIN'S WAY_RY UNREVEALING THE

SECRETS OF NATURE

AND REMEMBER, THAT YOU ARE THE GREATEST SECRET OF NATURE. SO, ANY EFFORT IS WORTH IT!

"MAN HAS SPLIT THE ATOM, CRACKED THE GENETIC CODE AND, IN A PROMETHEAN STEP UNIMAGINABLE A QUARTER CENTURY AGO, LEAPED FROM HIS OWN TERRESTRIAL HOME TO THE MOON. BUT HE HAS YET TO SOLVE THE MYSTERIES OF MEMORY, LEARNING AN CONSCIOUSNESS, OR MANAGED TO UNDERSTAND HIM SELF." IN THE PAST EIGHTEEN YEARS (1974-1992) SCIENTIFIC TECHNOLOGY HAS PRODUCED FURTHER SUCCESS, PARTICULAR IN THE FIELD OF COMPUTERS, WITH THEIR REMARKABLE MICROCHIPS AND ROBOTS. THESE HOWEVER, MERELY SIMULATE A BEING'S AUTOMATED SUB - CONSCIOUS ACTIVITY*(1). CONSCIOUSNESS AND VARIABLE THINKING (OR LEARNING) AND EVEN BIRTH AND DEATH, STILL REMAIN HAZY. SIGNIFICANT ADVANCES HAVE BEEN MADE IN THE FIELD OF GENETIC ENGINEERING (GRAFTING) TOO. BUT THIS IS NO MORE (AND PROBABLY LESS) THAN THE MANNER IN WHICH THE MOST PRIMITIVE FORMS OF LIFE, SUCH AS BACTERIA AND VIRUSES, CAN CHANGE OR ADJUST TO STRESS*(2). ALL THAT CAN OCCUR ANY HOW ARE ORIGINAL CAPACITY, AND EVOLUTION LIKE, MUTATIONS. EQUALLY REVEALING ARE GENETIC MANIPULATIONS, OR PRODDING FERTILIZED CELLS (EMBRYOS) BY SUBJECTING THEM TO ADVERSE CONDITIONS, TO OPEN UP THEIR MENTAL REPERTOIRES OF TRANSFORMATIONS AS ORIGINAL CAPACITY (HYBRID - LIKE) MUTATIONS*(3), ENHANCED CAPACITY MUTATIONS  CANNOT  BE  CAUSED BY GENETIC MANIPULATIONS OR ANY IMAGINABLE GRAFTING; THEY ARE A UNIQUE FEATURE OF THE EVOLUTIONARY PROCESS. *(4) INCIDENTALLY, GENETIC GRAFTS CAN TAKE OR ADJUST (TO THE CELL) ONLY IF SUCH CHANGES ARE WITHIN SPECIFIED LIMITS OF THE CELL'S NORMAL STRUCTURED ACTIVITY. AND ITS SPECIES CAPACITY*(5). ASTOUNDING ABILITY OF GENES IS NOT THE STRUCTURING OF CELL FUNCTION (WHICH USES ONLY A SMALL FRACTION OF THE GENES) BUT THEIR MOULDING OF THE BEING'S GROWTH TO ACQUIRE A BODILY CONFIGURATION (USING MUCH OF THE CELL'S GENES IN RELAYS). STARTING FROM A SINGLE CELL, THE GENES CAN GET IN PLACE, AN INHERITED BIRTH - MARK, IN AN ADULT HUMAN BODY; SIMPLY BY MOULDING GROWTH (WHICH HAS TO BE CONFINED TO THE DIRECTION AND NUMBER OF CELL DIVISIONS, AND CONTACT PRESSURE). AND, IT IS MOULDING DIFFICULTIES THAT  PREVENT   VITAL  ORGANS  BEING  RENEWED  LIKE  THE  BRANCHES  OF  A TREE! *(1) - BACTERIA ADJUST MOST ALARMINGLY BY TRANSFORMING THEMSELVES TO UTILIZE OR NEUTRALIZE, SUBSTANCE WHICH POISONED THEM EARLIER. BUT THIS (NATURAL SELECTION) DEVICE IS NOT THE SET FUNCTION OF GENES, LIKE HUMAN GENES PRODUCING ANTI BODIES. AND IT HAS TO BE THE DESPERATE TRANSFORMATION OF ONE OR A FEW GENES AT THE MOST; WHICH MEANS THAT AS BACTERIA ACQUIRE NEW DEFENSES, THEIR OLD ONES MUST DISAPPEAR! *(2) - ALL POSSIBLE GENETIC TRANSFORMATIONS OR ORIGINAL CAPACITY MUTATIONS ARE SPECIES SPECIFIC, FIXED AND INSTINCTIVE; OCCURRING CONSCIOUSLY, GRADUALLY AND INDIVIDUALLY, BY WISH MORE THAN WILL! A GENE CAN BE DAMAGED OR EVEN OBSTRUCTED, PHYSICALLY; BUT CAN BE TRANSFORMED, ONLY MENTALLY. *(3) - EVOLUTION MEANS AN INCREASE IN THE SPECIES CAPACITY TO FUNCTION (DUE TO MENTAL GROWTH) AND DIVERSIFY ITS CELL ACTIVITY, IN ORDER TO PRESERVE AND PROCREATE THE BODY. WHAT IS UNIQUE ABOUT HUMAN IS THAT THEIR DIVERSIFICATION'S HAS LARGELY BEEN TAKEN OVER BY INTELLECT, WHICH IN TURN IS ABLE TO CONSTRUCT DEVICES THAT CAN SATISFY MOST BODILY NEEDS. OTHER BODILY BEINGS, LIKE INSECTS, ALSO CONSTRUCT SOME DEVICES; BUT ALL OF THESE ARE SPECIES SPECIFIC AND FIXED AS INSTINCTS: NOT VOLUNTARY AND VARIABLE. HENCE, UNLIKE OTHER BODILY BEINGS, A HUMAN CAN ADJUST BY ONE'S OWN WILL TO THE SPECIES CAPACITY. BY THE TIME MAN 'STOOD UP', THE HORSE TOO HAD SHED ITS EXTRA TOES. Contrary to popular belief, Lorem Ipsum is not simply random text. It has roots in a piece of classical Latin literature from 45 BC, making it over 2000 years old. Richard McClintock, a Latin professor at Hampden-Sydney College in Virginia, looked up one of the more obscure Latin words, consectetur, from a Lorem Ipsum passage, and going through the cites of the word in classical literature, discovered the undoubtable source. 4. SOCIOLOGY

(THE BASIC OF THE COMIC RELIGION)

4. A, B

A. INCOMPATIBILITY

    IS WHEN TWO PEOPLE DISAGREE

BUT IF THEY WERE COMPATIBLE*(1)

THEN 'ANGER'*(2) THERE IS IMPOSSIBLE

*(1) - COMPATIBILITY DOES NOT MEAN THE SAME LIKES AND DISLIKES, BUT THE SAME 'SENSE OF VALUES' WHICH MUST ARISE FROM THOROUGHNESS, CASUALNESS, ON THE OTHER HAND, CANNOT ACCOMMODATE HUMAN INTELLECT (OR THE MAXIMUM NUMBER OF MENTAL ASSOCIATION POSSIBLE AS A RESULT OF EACH RECEPTOR PERCEPTION) TO THE FULL, FOR THE RATIONAL ASSESSMENT OF TRUE VALUES. THE TWO - A THOROUGH AND A CASUAL - CONSTITUTE A HUMAN, SUB-HUMAN' INCOMPATIBILITY. *(2) - ANGER USUALLY ARISES FROM A CONFRONTATION OF DOUBTS; AND NOT FROM AN EXPRESSION (EXPOSURE) OF ESTABLISHED WRONGS. SO THE BEST WAY TO AVOID SUCH CONFRONTATION, AS WELL AS SATISFY ONESELF, IS TO CLARIFY THE DOUBTS CRITICALLY-- WITHIN ONE'S OWN SELF. THEN, THERE WOULD BE NO NECESSITY FOR CONFRONTATION; AND ONE WILL BE ABLE TO DRIVE AMPLE SATISFACTION (OF AN ESTABLISHED TRUTH) AS WELL! (ANGER CAN ALSO ARISE FROM IRRITATION, AGITATION, FRUSTRATION, AND HUMILIATION AND, PERHAPS, OTHER CAUSES TOO. BUT IT IS AN ALWAYS A DISTURBING AND UGLY WAY OF SHOWING DISAPPROVAL. AND SHOULD NEVER BE PERMITTED A FREE REIN.)
  1. COMPATIBILITY IS THE ABILITY TO FIND COMMON HAPPINESS,*(1)
WITHOUT WHICH THERE CAN'T BE LOVE OR EVEN TRUE FRIENDLINESS SO IF TOGETHER YOU MUST BE, IN A UNION OR COMMUNITY; FIX LIFE'S GOAL OR ITS MENTAL LEADS*(2) THIS WILL BRING IN LINE ALL PHYSICAL NEED.*(3) *(1) - THIS SIGNIFIES A HAPPINESS WHICH ARISES FROM TRUE HUMAN WELFARE; FIXED AS LIFE'S PURPOSE, AND FOUNDED ON THOROUGHNESS. CASUALS (TOGETHER) MAY FIND MUCH HAPPINESS - OF A BASIC, BANAL VARIETY. FOR A CASUAL AND A THOROUGH, IT IS 'NEVER THE TWAIN'. (CASUALS RARELY HAVE A LIFE'S PURPOSE; IF THEY DO, IT IS INTELLECTUALLY SCANTY.) *(2) - YOUR 'SENSE OF VALUES' OR 'PRIORITIES' DETERMINE YOUR WAY OF LIVING. THESE ARE: 1. HOW TO EARN - MEANS OF LIVING, 2. WHAT TO LEARN - UTILIZATION OF HUMAN INTELLECT AND 3. THE WAY TO RELAX - HEALTH AND HAPPINESS; AND CONSTITUTE THE MENTAL LEADS OF LIFE'S GOAL, OR LIFE'S PURPOSE. *(3) - PHYSICAL NEEDS ARE A DIRECT MANIFESTATION OF MENTAL LEEDS, THE PHYSICAL NEEDS OF HUMANS VARY LITTLE, AND EVEN THIS CAN BE ADJUSTED EASILY. FOR, ALL SENSE DELIGHTS ARE AS OLD AS THE HUMAN YET AS NEW AS THE MOMENT. BUT THE REAL BINDING FACTOR OF HUMANS ARISES FROM THE UTILIZATION OF THEIR INTELLECT, AND RESULTING SECURITY; AS EVIDENCED BY RELIGION AND POLITICS: THE ESTABLISHED THE ESTABLISHED MEANS OF WELFARE. THE HUMAN DESIRE TO INVESTIGATE AND COMPREHEND LIFE, OR THE TRUE NATURE OF THINGS, SHOULD ALWAYS REMAIN DOMINANT. AS IT IS THIS (WHICH MADE HUMANS 'STAND UP' TO INQUIRE BETTER) THAT TRULY ELEVATES THEM ABOVE ALL OTHER BODILY BEINGS, AND STABILIZES LIVING. THIS THEN IS THE HIGHER IDEAL OF TRUE LEARNING. IF ONE IS THOROUGHNESS. IT IS POSSIBLE TO LEARN AT ALL TIMES; UT IF CASUAL, LEARNING EVEN AT STUDY BECOMES DIFFICULT. ALSO, GENUINE CONTENTMENT IS A RATIONAL RESTRAINT TO PURSUE TRUE LEARNING ... RELUCTANT RESIGNATION DUE TO BELIEF OR JUST INDOLENCE 4C. PRIDE OR INORDINATE SELF-ESTEEM LOOMS LARGE ABOVE ALL OTHER HUMAN FRAILTIES (WITH THE EXCEPTION OF DECEPTION) AS IT STANDS IN THE WAY OF ASSOCIATING WITH ASSESSING AND ACQUIRING KNOWLEDGE FROM THOSE 'INFERIOR' TO ONESELF.*(1) (ALSO, ANY KNOWLEDGE ONE ACQUIRES IS OF LITTLE VALUE, IF IT IS INCAPABLE OF ACCOMMODATING OTHERS' REACTIONS TO IT AS WELL. THE THOUGHT OF FEELING INADEQUATE, OR AN INFERIORITY COMPLEX, CAN PRODUCE A PARALLEL EFFECTS; OF BE DRUDGING AND REJECTING LEARNING MERELY BECAUSE IT HAS COME ............ SOURCE, WHICH ONE BELIEVES, IS PRIVILEGED. (B.............ING ALSO OPENS UP A VISTA OF ENVY AND HATE). THOSE TWO EXTREMES - OF PRIDE AND PREJUDICE AND INFERIORITY AND INSECURITY - CONSTITUTE THE WORST FORMS OF DELUSION,*(2) WHICH OFTEN DEPRIVE ONESELF OF ACCESS TO KNOWLEDGE - POSSIBLY VITAL. (BETWEEN THESE TWO EXTREME LIES CONFIDENCE OF KNOWING,'THAT WHICH UNDERLIES APPEARANCES'.) *(1) - ONE CAN BE MENTALLY SUPERIOR ONLY IF ONE HAS A SUPERIOR CHARACTER, WHICH MUST NECESSARILY ARISE FROM A SUPERIOR INTELLECT, ENABLING ONE TO IDENTIFY ONESELF WITH AND COMPREHEND ANY SORT OF EXPER...............TANY TIME. THIS IS EMPATHY. AND, IT ALSO ENABLES A HUMAN TO BE CONTINUALLY ALERT EVEN TO CONVERT OTHERS EXPERIENCES, INCLUDING THE RESPONSES OF NON- HUMANS, TO ONE'S OWN KNOWLEDGE (AND SO CONFIRM ONE'S OWN EXPERIENCES) FOR TRUE SUPERIORITY. MOREOVER, THIS IS THE ONLY WAY BY WHICH ONE CAN  ' DO UNTO OTHERS AS YOU WOULD EXPECT OTHERS TO DO UNTO YOU' - IF RESERVED. (THIS IS HUMAN JUSTICE AND, IS NOT THE BASIS FOR SUB-HUMAN COMPASSION) *(2) - SUCH DELUSIONS INVARIABLY LEAD TO INTRACTABLE IGNORANCE AND SELF - DECEPTION: 'HE WHO KNOWS NOT THAT HE KNOWS NOT'! FEAR OF FAILURE PREVENTS ONE FROM ATTEMPTING TO LEARN, THEN 'PRIDES HIMSELF INTO SHOWING THAT - HE ALREADY KNOWS'. THE SAME BEGRUDGING AND REJECTING THE PRIVILEGED, APPLY TO SUBTLE 'INADEQUACIES' TOO. (THE LIFE OF THE LATE PRESIDENT PREMADASA OF SRI LANKA SHOWS, HOW AN OVERPOWERING INFERIORITY COMPLEX CAN LEAD TO AN INORDINATE SELF ESTEEM AND A DELUSION THAT ONE KNOWS BEST, ABOUT THING OF WHICH ONE ACTUALLY  KNOWS NOTHING ABOUT. PREMADASA WAS JUST IMBALANCED, NOT MENTALLY DERANGED; AND REQUIRED ONLY COUNSELING OF A PSYCHOANALYST, TO SET RIGHT HIS 'SENSE OF VALUES'.) 4 .D EVEN THE SIMPLEST INDULGENCE SHOULD BE RATIONALLY ASSESSED, IF ONE IS TO DERIVE THE VERY BEST FROM IT. THEN, WHAT ONE LIKES AND DISLIKES (RATIONALLY) WOULD CONFORM PERFECTLY TO WHAT IS RIGHT AND WRONG (NATURALLY); AND COULD NO WAY DISTORT TRUTHS - OF JUSTICE OR REALITY. TRADITION IS THE MAIN OBSTACLE TO SUCH ASSESSMENT AND ADJUSTMENT; AND A SOLACE TO TH DIFFERENT. EVERY ACTION OF ANY BEING IS WITH THE WANT OF HA HAPPINESS; EITHER TO CONSTRUCT DIRECT HAPPINESS, TO OVERCOME UNHAPPINESS. NO AMOUNT OF TRADITION CAN ALTER THIS FACT. TRADITION ALSO CAN NEVER...? ER THE FACT THAT INDIVIDUALS ARE NOT DISTINGUISHED BY THEIR BODIES; BUT BY THE WAY THEY USE THEM...... MEANS THAT YOU ARE DEFINITELY NOT YOUR BODY! THOUGH TRADITION HAS TO MAKE YOU OUT AS YOUR BODY. (AUTHORS OF BOOKS, WHICH ARE NOT EXTREMELY TECHNICAL, CAN COME CLOSE TO BEING AUTHORITIES ON SUBJECTS; MERELY BY RESEARCHING FOR THEM. THIS AMOUNTS TO CONFIRMING FACTS BY REASONING THEM ON ONE'S OWN EXPERIENCES. AND THE MORE ONE INVESTIGATES BY ASSOCIATE AND ASSESSING, THE MORE WILL ONE BE ACQUIRING ESTABLISHED FACTS THAT ARE NEARER TO TRUTHS. AS A TRUTH IS AND ABSOLUTE, UNCHANGING FACT. IF WE FOLLOW THIS PROCEDURE, IT WILL BE POSSIBLE FOR US TO REASON OUT THEM MOST PERFECT COSMIC RELIGION. AFTER ALL, REASON PERVADES THE ENTIRETY OF EXISTENCE; WITHOUT WHICH THERE COULD BE NO DEDUCE KNOWLEDGE. AND, THERE CAN BE ONE TRUTH ONLY, ABOUT OUR PAST, PRESENT AND FUTURE; WITH IT EXTENDING TO A COSMIC RELIGION.)

6 .A

"THE GIFT OF TRUTH*(1)

*(2 )DHAMMA MEANS TRUTH (OF LIFE AND EXISTENCE) OR THAT WHICH UNDERLIES APPEARANCE (REALITY) DHAMMA*(2) OR (REALITY) EXCELS ALL OTHERS GIFTS.*(3) "

*(1 )THE TRUTH MUST NOT

ONLY BE LOGICAL

OR RATIONAL, BUT

ALSO EMPIRICAL OR CAPABLE OF PRODUCING

OBSERVABLE RESULTS TOO
-THE BUDDHA- *(3) - HELPING HUMANS TO ELEVATE THEM SELVES, BY REALIZING TRUE VALUES, IS A GEN.......T. THIS BECOMES A UNIQUE GIFT AT THE ULTIMATE STAGE - OF HELP TOWARDS REALIZING THE MEANING OF LIFE AND, TO LIFE: REALITY! (ALLEVIATING POVERTY WITHOUT ELEVATING THE HUMAN BEING WILL LEAD, AT BEST, TO STAGNATION; NOT PROGRESS; EVEN IF THERE IS A SHORT - LIVED IMPROVEMENT OR RELIEF OF SUFFERING. FOR WITHOUT TRUE VALUES, THE BEING BECOMES BASIC. A HOUSE WITHOUT A HOME AND EMPLOYMENT WITHOUT A COMMITMENT MAY MEAN SURVIVAL, BUT NOT PROGRESS. EVEN AFFLUENCE GETS BOGGED WITHOUT A PROPER PURPOSE AND THE OIL-RICH MIDDLE-EAST EXEMPLIFIES THIS WELL. PROGRESS MEANS ACHIEVEMENT. HOW CAN ANYONE ACHIEVE ANY THING, IF HE OR SHE IS IGNORANT EVEN OF THE BASICS OF REALITY?  CAN GIVING UP THE COMPLEXITIES OF THINKING, TO A COMPUTERS, BE AN ACHIEVEMENT? WOULDN'T THIS ALSO STIFLE NORMAL THINKING - THE CRITERION OF ANTHROPOID EVOLUTION? THE HUMAN 'STOOD UP', IN EVOLUTION, TO INQUIRE BETTER; NOW IT JUST SITS DOWN, TO PROGRAMME COMPUTERS. COMPUTERS, LIKE BOOKS, SHOULD JUST BE DATA BANKS. THEY SHOULD NEVER SUBSTITUTE THINKING; ONLY ADD TO IT - WHEN...?)  
  1. C
IF ONE HAS SPENT ONE'S ENTIRE LIFE IN DOING 'GOOD', BUT STILL HAS TO REMAIN MISERABLE, THERE MUST BE SOMETHING WRONG. FOR AT BEST, IT IS LIKE HAVING MUCH MONEY IN THE BANK BUT NOTHING IN THE HAND!  
  1. D 1
ALL RELIGIOUS ZEALOTS, WHEN CONFRONTED WITH OBVIOUS FACTS DIVERGENT TO THEIR VIEWS, TEND TO QUOTE THE SCRIPTURES AS A FINALITY. BUT SHOULDN'T ANY SCRIPTURE BE USED ONLY TO SUBSTANTIATE RATIONAL THINKING? BELIEF STARTS WITH THE BELIEF THAT SUCH BELIEF WILL GRANT ONE DIVINE ASSISTANCE; WHICH IS TRULY A FALSE BELIEF!  
  1. D2
ALL LIVING BEINGS BE THEY GREAT OR SMALL, SEEK HAPPINESS, AND THAT IS ALL; AND TO HELP THEM ALONG, AS  COMPASSION'S  WAY, SHOULD  ENSURE YOUR HELP, IN THE  VERY SAME  WAY.*(1) THIS IS A RATIONAL ASSUMPTION, WHICH WOULD BE COMPLETE IF SUPERNATURAL HELP TOO DID ACTUALLY OCCUR. OF COURSE, NOW THAT'S THE 'END' * REALITY- HAS BEEN EXPOSED; MERELY STRIVING FOR THE 'MEANS' - MORALITY- MAY NOT BE GOOD ENOUGH; TO ENSURE MAXIMUM HELP, UNLESS UNLESS ONE, AT LEAST, TURNS TOWARDS REALITY, AS WELL, (ALL THOSE RESPONSIBLE FOR THE TIME ARTICLE OF 14TH JANUARY 1974, QUOTED HERE IN 2 AND 3., HAVE ALREADY PIONEERED THE CAUSE AND TURNED TOWARDS REALITY.) TURNING TOWARDS REALITY MEANS ATTEMPTING TO SEE THE TRUTH, OR THAT WHICH UNDERLIES APPEARANCES, IN ANYTHING. FOR REALITY IS MANIFEST IN EVERYTHING. THE REQUIREMENT FOR SUCH RESEARCH IS A SET OF TRUE VALUES*(2) (OR A MIDDLE PATH) TO "SEE THINGS AS THEY REALLY ARE". *(1) - EVEN THE BAD (HEARTLESS) TEND TO HELP THE GOOD (COMPASSIONATE). WHERE AS EVEN THE AVOWED GOOD ARE HESITANT ABOUT HELPING HOSE WHO ARE HEARTLESS. THIS IS WHAT MAKES COMPASSION THE COMMON SENSE, COSMIC CALL. *(2) - THE DIRECTIVES OF EFFORTS, FROM TRUE VALUES, ARE: DISCOVERING THE TRUTH OF LIFE AND EXISTENCE - 50  TO  90%, RELIEF OF PAIN IN ONE'S WAY OF LIVING - 40 TO 90% (INCLUDING LIVELIHOOD AND INDULGENCE IN (SENSE) PLEASURE AS A RELAXATION - 10 TO 1%. WITHOUT TRUE VALUES, THE BEING BECOMES BASIC. BASIC MEANS ANIMAL- EVEN IF REFINED!)

1 A. LET US BE HUMAN - WORTHY OF OUR INTELLECTUALS EVOLUTION

THE RELIGION OF THE FUTURE WILL BE A

COSMIC RELIGION. IT SHOULD TRANSCEND

A PERSONAL GOD AND AVOID DOGMAS AND

THEOLOGY. COVERING BOTH THE NATURAL AND

THE SPIRITUAL, IT SHOULD BE BASED ON A

RELIGIOUS SENSE ARISING PROM THE EXPERIENCE

OF ALL THINGS, NATURAL AND SPIRITUAL,

AS A MEANINGFUL ENTITY."

MANY HUMANS (UNLIKE ANIMALS) AT ONE TIME OR ANOTHER, SEEK

SUPERNATURAL ASSISTANCE - OVERTLY OR COVERTLY. THIS IS NORMAL.

WHAT IS ABNORMAL AND DEROGATORY, IS TO MASK ONE'S INTELLECT IN SO DOING:

TO "PRAISE THE LORD," WHO CREATED INTELLECT! THIS IS STRANGE. BUT,

LIKE MOST THINGS, THE SOLUTION TO THIS TOO IS BASICALLY

SIMPLE AND THROUGHOUT RATIONAL: A FORMULA FOR HAPPY LIVING OR THE FUTURE COSMIC RELIGION (COMMENTARY) I

TRUE FAITH IS A TRUST, WITH WHICH ONE REASONS THE UNKNOWN; AND, IT IS

NOT JUST DEFENDING DOGMA, BY UNREASONING THE UNKNOWN! (COMMENTARY II)

THE COSMIC (COMMON SENSE) RELIGION *(1) THE SAME SUPERIOR RIGHTEOUS POWER
*(1) 1. WHAT ONE LIKES AND DISLIKES (RATIONALLY) SHOULD CONFORM TOO PERFECTLY WITH WHAT IS RIGHT AND WRONG (NATURALLY). THAT WAS RESPONSIBLE FOR THE MIRACLES OF JESUS AND MOHAMMED, WOULD MAINTAIN THE EFFECTS OF THE COSMIC RELIGION TOO. (AS THE BASIC TENETS OF CHRISTIANITY AND ISLAM PROVIDE THE RATIONALLY ASSESSED VALUES - FOR RIGHT LIVING.)
  1. IMMEDIATE REWARD (OR REPRISAL) FOR

  1. D6 VERY IMPORTANT STATIC ELECTRICITY*
CERTAIN ATOMS CAN ACQUIRE EXTRA ELECTRONS IN THEIR OUTER ORBITS, AS A PHENOMENON AND NOT JUST A PART OF A CHEMICAL REACTION. THESE EXTRA ELECTRONS, CAN BE DISCHARGED. BUT SUCH ATOMS CAN SOON ACQUIRE THEM AGAIN. THIS IS STATIC ELECTRICITY. AN ELECTRON CAN BE AN ELECTRON, ONLY IN AN ATOM! ALSO, THERE ARE NO POSITIVE AND NEGATIVE CHARGES OF ELECTRICITY; JUST AN EXCESS OR DEFICIT OF ELECTRONS - IN AN ATOM.*(02) HOW EVER, THERE ARE POSITIVE AND NEGATIVE CHARGERS IN MAGNETISM; AS NORTH AND SOUTH SEEKING PARTICLES. SCIENCE WOULD BE FARLESS CONFOUNDING IF ONE ALWAYS LOOKS FOR NATURE’S PURPOSE WHY IS IT SO? MAGNETISM, FOR INSTANCE, IS MORE CLOSELY ALIGNED TO GRAVITY THAN TO ELECTRICITY. SINCE BOTH MAGNETISM (MAGNETON ENERGY) AND GRAVITY ARE DERIVED FROM THE EARTH’S SPIN; WITH MAGNETISM REINFORCING GRAVITY FOR A SPHEROIDAL, MATERIAL CHOESION*(03)    *(01). THE ATOMS CONSTITUTING A COPPER WIRE THAT CONDUCT ELECTRICITY ARE QUITE CONTENT TO STAY AS THEY ARE; UNTIL THEY HAVE TO CONDUCT A LOAD OF ELECTRONS IN THEIR OUTER ORBITS - AS A (SERIES) CHEMICAL REACTION. HOWEVER, IT IS QUITE DIFFERENT WITH CERTAIN ATOMS LIKE SILICON WHICH HAVE AN AFFINITY FOR EXTRA ELECTRONS - AS STATIC ELECTRICITY; THOUGH THEY GET RID OF THEM (BY DISCHARGING) AND THEN ACQUIRE THEM A NEW. THESE ATOMS ACQUIRE THE EXTRA ELECTRONS DUE TO AFFINITY, AND DISCHARGE THEM FOR STABILITY. A HEATED CATHODE, AS OFTEN SEEN, CAN PRODUCE A STREAM OF ATOMS WITH EXCESS ELECTRONS IN THEIR OUTER ORBITS; WHICH WILL DIRECTLY MOVE TOWARDS ANODAL ATOMS WITH A RELATIVE DEFICIT OF ELECTRONS. THIS IS A CHEMICAL REACTION CAUSING A TRANSFER OF ELECTRONS; AND NOT A TYPICAL ELECTROCHEMICAL REACTION THAT SHARES (OR FIXES) IT’S ELECTRONS. IT IS ALSO UNLIKE A LASER BEAM, FOR INSTANCE; WHICH IS AN ESTABLISHED PHOTON (ELECTROMAGNETIC) WAVE FORM. SO THERE IS STATIC ELECTRICITY, CONDUCTED ELECTRICITY, AND EVEN CONVICTED ELECTRICITY - ALL AS ATOMS: NO FREE ELECTRONS. SPARKING ELECTRICITY - FROM STATIC CRACKLING TO ATMOSPHERIC LIGHTING - IS ATOMS DISCHARGING THE ENERGIES OF EXCESS ELECTRONS FOR CHEMICAL (STABILITY OR) EQUILIBRIUM.  AND, THOUGH IT IS THOUGHT THAT ONLY MOLECULES MOVE; THERE IS CONSIDERABLE MOVEMENT OF ATOMS TOO; IN TRYING TO GAIN (CHEMICAL) EQUILIBRIUM, BY FIXING, FREEING OR TRANSFERRING ELECTRONS. *(ALL CELESTIAL BODIES ARE SPHEROIDAL, AS THEY MAINTAINED THIS WAY BY GRAVITY AND MAGNETISM - A COMBINATION OF HORIZONTAL AND VERTICAL HOLDS.   1. D7 VERY IMPORTANT ORGANIC MATTER
THE PRODUCTION OF ORGANIC MATTER IS A GENETIC PHENOMENON. THE CHLOROPHYLL IN PLANTS MERELY FIX THE SUN’S ENERGY IN THE COMPOUNDED CARBON ATOMS OF BASIC ORGANIC MATTER. THE STRUCTURE OF ORGANIC MATTER IS THE COMPOUNDED CARBON ATOM RING; WHICH CONSTITUTE SIX CARBON ATOMS. THIS ENABLES EACH CARBON ATOMS TO BE FIXED TO TWO OTHERS; AND ‘FREES’ TWO OF ITS ELECTRONS TO ACQUIRE AND RELEASE ENERGY, WITHOUT ANY DESTABILIZING EFFECTS ON THE NUCLEUS. THIS IS THE ENERGY OF ORGANIC MATTER; WHICH CAN BE ACQUIRED AND RELEASED PRECISELY - GENETICALLY! TWO ELECTRONS OF EACH   CARBON ATOM IN A COMPOUNDED RING ARE NOT FREED (OF THEIR NUCLEAR BONDING) AND ARE ONLY ABLE TO REACT ELECTROCHEMICALLY OR INORGANICALLY. IT IS THESE REACTIONS THAT TRIGGER THE RELEASE OF ENERGY, BUT MAY INCOMPLETELY BREAK UP THE CARBON ATOM RING INTO HYDROCARBONS; WHICH IS THE LINK BETWEEN ORGANIC AND INORGANIC MATTER. ANY MECHANICAL ENERGY, ASSOCIATED WITH INORGANIC MATTER, CANNOT BE STORED PURPOSIVELY; TO BE MADE AVAILABLE PRECISELY. ELECTROCHEMICAL REACTIONS CAN DO THIS. AS THE REVERSE RELEASE OF THIS ENERGY IS VITAL FOR THE LIFE PROCESS OF MAN TO MICROBE. IT SEEMS CERTAIN THAT THE COMPOUNDED CARBON ATOMS RETAIN THE EXTRA ENERGY IN ORGANIC COMPOUNDS. *(02).   1. DS ELECTRO - MAGNETIC INDUCTION*(01)
THE MAGNETON IS CONSTITUTED PRIMARILY AS THE EARTH’S MAGNETIC FIELD; WITHOUT WHICH THERE COULD BE NO SECONDARY MAGNETIC PHENOMENA. WHEN ELECTRICITY IS CONDUCTED IN A WIRE, IT AFFECTS THE ESTABLISHED EARTH’S MAGNETIC FIELD, THAT IS ALREADY POSITIONED IN THE WIRE.*(02) IN OVERCOMING THIS (MAGNETIC) RESISTENCE, SOME OF THE (CONDUCTED) ELECTRONS GIVE UP THE ENERGY WHICH IS BEING CARRIED. THE RELEASED ENERGY IS ABSORBED BY MAGNETONS TO CREATE A FORCE-FIELD AROUND THE WIRE. THIS MAGNETIC FORCE FIELD TENDS TO OPPOSE THE FLOW OF ELECTRONS, BY PUSHING THE WIRE AWAY, AND HENCE RESTORING THE EARTH’S MAGNETIC FIELD. A PUSHING THE WIRE AWAY, AND HENCE RESTORING THE EARTH’S MAGNETIC FIELD. A POWERFUL ELECTRO - MAGNET CAN REPLACE (IN TRUTH IT CAN ONLY REINFORCE) THE EARTH’S FIELD, AND THE PHENOMENON OF OPPOSING A CHANGE TO AN ESTABLISHED MAGNETIC FIELD*(03), CAN BE MADE USE OF TO CAUSE MOVEMENT, OR BE CONVERTED TO ELECTRICITY AND (MECHANICAL) MOVEMENT. ALL THESE ARE SECONDARY MAGNETIC PHENOMENA; AND HAVE TO FUNCTION IN UNION WITH THE EARTH’S FIELD. IN OTHER WORDS, THE EARTH’S SPIN IS TRANSMITTED ONLY FOR GRAVITATION, AND THE EARTH’S MAGNETIC FIELD. *(01). ANY INSTANT INDUCTION (MAGNETIC, MECHANICAL OR MENTAL) IS IN STRAIGHT LINES. HENCE THE CHANGES IN DIRECTION HAS TO TAKE PLACE IN STAGES - AS TANGENTIAL TRANSMISSIONS. *(02).THERE ARE NO FREE ELECTRONS (LIKE PHOTONS OR MAGNETONS); SO ANY ELECTRONS CONDUCTED IN ELECTRICITY ARE FROM ATOM ATOM. IT IS THESE ATOMIC REACTIONS THAT AFFECT THE MAGNETIC FIELD TOO. (THE PHOTON IS NOT CONSTITUTED LIKE THE MAGNETON; AND IS NOT AFFECTED BY ELECTRICITY.) *(03).THE OPPOSITION TO CHANGE IS ONLY MOMENTARY; TILL THE CHANGE ITSELF GETS ESTABLISHED; THEN IT RESISTS ANY CHANGE. THIS STRANGE PHENOMENON (LIKE IS CLOSELY ALLIED TO ONE OF GRAVITY, IN THEIR PURPOSE OF MAINTAINING MATERIAL (MOLECULAR0 CHOESION. BOTH OF WHICH FUNCTION JOINTLY, BY AN INDUCTION OF THEIR ENERGIES; TO KEEP ANY WHIRLING SPACE OBJECT (LIKE THE EARTH OR A STAR) TOGETHER.) *(04). IN THIS PRODUCTION OF ELECTRICITY THE CHANGE TO A MAGNETIC FIELD IS BROUGHT ABOUT BY THE ‘PUSH’ ‘PULL’ EFFECTS OF A COIL. THE MECHANICAL ENERGY USED IS CONVERTED TO MAGNETISM, AND THE MAGNETISM ITSELF TO ELECTRICITY-AS IN A DYNAMO. ARE VERSE (MOTOR) EFFECT CAN BE CAUSED IF THE MAGNETIZATION IS MADE INTO SEGMENTS OF A CIRCLE. THEN THE ‘PUSH’ ‘PULL’ EFFECTS AT THE CENTRE CAN BE MADE USE OF ME CYNICALLY, INTO ROTATING A FAN FOR INSTANCE.
  1. D6 VERY IMPORTANT STATIC ELECTRICITY*
CERTAIN ATOMS CAN ACQUIRE EXTRA ELECTRONS IN THEIR OUTER ORBITS, AS A PHENOMENON AND NOT JUST A PART OF A CHEMICAL REACTION. THESE EXTRA ELECTRONS, CAN BE DISCHARGED. BUT SUCH ATOMS CAN SOON ACQUIRE THEM AGAIN. THIS IS STATIC ELECTRICITY. AN ELECTRON CAN BE AN ELECTRON, ONLY IN AN ATOM! ALSO, THERE ARE NO POSITIVE AND NEGATIVE CHARGES OF ELECTRICITY; JUST AN EXCESS OR DEFICIT OF ELECTRONS - IN AN ATOM.*(02) HOW EVER, THERE ARE POSITIVE AND NEGATIVE CHARGERS IN MAGNETISM; AS NORTH AND SOUTH SEEKING PARTICLES. SCIENCE WOULD BE FARLESS CONFOUNDING IF ONE ALWAYS LOOKS FOR NATURE’S PURPOSE WHY IS IT SO? MAGNETISM, FOR INSTANCE, IS MORE CLOSELY ALIGNED TO GRAVITY THAN TO ELECTRICITY. SINCE BOTH MAGNETISM (MAGNETON ENERGY) AND GRAVITY ARE DERIVED FROM THE EARTH’S SPIN; WITH MAGNETISM REINFORCING GRAVITY FOR A SPHEROIDAL, MATERIAL CHOESION*(03)    *(01). THE ATOMS CONSTITUTING A COPPER WIRE THAT CONDUCT ELECTRICITY ARE QUITE CONTENT TO STAY AS THEY ARE; UNTIL THEY HAVE TO CONDUCT A LOAD OF ELECTRONS IN THEIR OUTER ORBITS - AS A (SERIES) CHEMICAL REACTION. HOWEVER, IT IS QUITE DIFFERENT WITH CERTAIN ATOMS LIKE SILICON WHICH HAVE AN AFFINITY FOR EXTRA ELECTRONS - AS STATIC ELECTRICITY; THOUGH THEY GET RID OF THEM (BY DISCHARGING) AND THEN ACQUIRE THEM A NEW. THESE ATOMS ACQUIRE THE EXTRA ELECTRONS DUE TO AFFINITY, AND DISCHARGE THEM FOR STABILITY. A HEATED CATHODE, AS OFTEN SEEN, CAN PRODUCE A STREAM OF ATOMS WITH EXCESS ELECTRONS IN THEIR OUTER ORBITS; WHICH WILL DIRECTLY MOVE TOWARDS ANODAL ATOMS WITH A RELATIVE DEFICIT OF ELECTRONS. THIS IS A CHEMICAL REACTION CAUSING A TRANSFER OF ELECTRONS; AND NOT A TYPICAL ELECTROCHEMICAL REACTION THAT SHARES (OR FIXES) IT’S ELECTRONS. IT IS ALSO UNLIKE A LASER BEAM, FOR INSTANCE; WHICH IS AN ESTABLISHED PHOTON (ELECTROMAGNETIC) WAVE FORM. SO THERE IS STATIC ELECTRICITY, CONDUCTED ELECTRICITY, AND EVEN CONVICTED ELECTRICITY - ALL AS ATOMS: NO FREE ELECTRONS. SPARKING ELECTRICITY - FROM STATIC CRACKLING TO ATMOSPHERIC LIGHTING - IS ATOMS DISCHARGING THE ENERGIES OF EXCESS ELECTRONS FOR CHEMICAL (STABILITY OR) EQUILIBRIUM.  AND, THOUGH IT IS THOUGHT THAT ONLY MOLECULES MOVE; THERE IS CONSIDERABLE MOVEMENT OF ATOMS TOO; IN TRYING TO GAIN (CHEMICAL) EQUILIBRIUM, BY FIXING, FREEING OR TRANSFERRING ELECTRONS. *(ALL CELESTIAL BODIES ARE SPHEROIDAL, AS THEY MAINTAINED THIS WAY BY GRAVITY AND MAGNETISM - A COMBINATION OF HORIZONTAL AND VERTICAL HOLDS. IF FOR INSTANCE THE EARTH WAS HELD BY GRAVITY ALONE, IT WOULD BE ELECTRICAL LIKE THE EYE OF A WHIRL POOLING TORNADO. THE EFFECT OF MAGNETISM IS NOT AS WIDESPREAD GRAVITY. IT IS A RATHER LOCALIZED MOULDING FORCE. HOWEVER, THE POLES OR ENDS HAVE MORE MAGNETISM AND LESS GRAVITY.... THE ACCELERATION DUE TO GRAVITY IS UNIFORM, BECAUSE THE ENERGY IS INDUCTED. IN INDUCTION THERE IS NO POSSIBILITY OF ANY ENERGY LOSS, AS IS USUAL IN CONDUCTED ENERGY; THE ACCELERATION IN A WHIRLING TORNADO IS FAR FROM UNIFORM! THE PHENOMENON OF GRAVITY CAN BE OBSERVED IN ANY WHIRL POOLING FORCE. BUT THE INCORPORATION OF A MAGNETIC FORCE OR FIELD IS UNIQUE, AND OCCURS ONLY WHEN INORGANIC MATTER IS FORMED FROM PRIMARY MATTER, BY A WHIRL POOLING OF INDUCTED ENERGY. (THE GREATEST MAGNETIC FIELD WOULD HAVE BEEN AROUND THE ‘BIG-BANG UNIT!’)
  1. D7 VERY IMPORTANT ORGANIC MATTER
THE PRODUCTION OF ORGANIC MATTER IS A GENETIC PHENOMENON. THE CHLOROPHYLL IN PLANTS MERELY FIX THE SUN’S ENERGY IN THE COMPOUNDED CARBON ATOMS OF BASIC ORGANIC MATTER. THE STRUCTURE OF ORGANIC MATTER IS THE COMPOUNDED CARBON ATOM RING; WHICH CONSTITUTE SIX CARBON ATOMS. THIS ENABLES EACH CARBON ATOMS TO BE FIXED TO TWO OTHERS; AND ‘FREES’ TWO OF ITS ELECTRONS TO ACQUIRE AND RELEASE ENERGY, WITHOUT ANY DESTABILIZING EFFECTS ON THE NUCLEUS. THIS IS THE ENERGY OF ORGANIC MATTER; WHICH CAN BE ACQUIRED AND RELEASED PRECISELY - GENETICALLY! TWO ELECTRONS OF EACH   CARBON ATOM IN A COMPOUNDED RING ARE NOT FREED (OF THEIR NUCLEAR BONDING) AND ARE ONLY ABLE TO REACT ELECTROCHEMICALLY OR INORGANICALLY. IT IS THESE REACTIONS THAT TRIGGER THE RELEASE OF ENERGY, BUT MAY INCOMPLETELY BREAK UP THE CARBON ATOM RING INTO HYDROCARBONS; WHICH IS THE LINK BETWEEN ORGANIC AND INORGANIC MATTER. ANY MECHANICAL ENERGY, ASSOCIATED WITH INORGANIC MATTER, CANNOT BE STORED PURPOSIVELY; TO BE MADE AVAILABLE PRECISELY. ELECTROCHEMICAL REACTIONS CAN DO THIS. BUT IS MOSTLY UNSUITED FOR CELLULAR ACTIVITY. (CELLS DIE WITHOUT OXYGEN, AS THE ORGANIC REACTIONS TRIGGERING THE RE LEASE OF ENERGY, FAIL TO OCCUR WITHOUT OXYGEN IN THE PROCESS OF RELEASING ENERGY, A MOLECULE OF GLUCOSE BREAK DOWN COMPLETELY TO CARBON DIOXIDE AND WATER. MOST CARBOHYDRATES FUNCTION THIS WAY, AND CONSTITUTE THE BASIC SOURCE OF ENERGY OF BOTH ANIMALS AND PLANTS. FATS CANNOT DO THIS, AND USUALLY BREAK UP INCOMPLETELY INTO HYDROCARBONS ANAEROBIC ORGANISMS RELEASE ENERGY WITHOUT OXYGEN.)
  1. D8 THE NEUTRONS OF THE NUCLEUS (OF AN ATOM)
THE FUNCTION THE NEUTRONS IS ESSENTIALLY ONE OF BINDING - THE PROTONS! THIS IS MUCH LIKE THE WAY HEAT BINDS THE ABSTRACT ENERGIES OF SOLIDITY, FLUIDITY AND GASEITY IN A SUB-ATOMIC PARTICLE. BUT SOME NUCLEI ALSO SEEM TO HAVE AN IDIOSYNCRASY OR AFFINITY FOR EXTRA NEUTRONS - JUST LIKE STATIC ELECTRICITY. AND, SIMILAR TO STATIC ELECTRICITY, THE EXCESS NEUTRONS TOO HAVE TO BE DISCHARGED - FOR STABILITY. SO THERE COULD BE NO LARGE SCALE STORING OF NEUTRON ENERGY, AS A HUGE EXPLOSIVE DEVISE. THE PARALLEL IS THE POSSIBILITY OF EXPLOSIVE POWER LIGHTNING! IF THE NUCLEUS CANNOT DISCHARGE NEUTRONS, THERE WILL BE NO ABSORPTION. RELEASE OF ENERGY, BY FISSION OR FUSION, ULTIMATELY AMOUNTS TO THE RELEASE OF ISOTOPE NEUTRON ENERGY! THOUGH COMPLETE DISINTEGRATION OF THE ATOM BY DIRECT NUCLEAR DESTABILIZATION IS ALWAYS POSSIBLE.

THIS IN ITSELF PROVES THAT THE HUMANS ARE THE MOST EVOLVED BODILY BEINGS, FUNCTIONING JUST BELOW THE BASIC IND STRENGTHS WERE THE MAXIMUM. THIS HAS TO BE THE PREREQUISITE THAT COULD INFLUENCE THE BASIC MIND STRENGTH OF THESE INDIVIDUALS INTO BEING ACTIVATED AS A VARIANT, WHEN THEY WERE STRIVING FOR HIGHER HAPPINESS. (THIS ALMOST IDENTICAL TO THE WAY IN WHICH THE RESERVE RECEPTOR PLANES ARE RECRUITED IN HIGHER BEINGS WITH MAXIMUM SPECIFIC MIND STRENGTHS, TO INCREASE RHYTHMICITY AND INTENSITY OF HAPPINESS. ) *(03) A HIGHER EVOLVED LIFE MEANS BEING TRULY INDEPENDENT, OR BEING ABLE TO THINK AND FUNCTION WITHOUT BODILY BIAS. THIS AMOUNTS TO BEING RATIONALLY ASSESSED ALWAYS - IN ONE’S ROUTINE LIVING (OR A VOCATION) AND THE WAY BY WHICH ONE ACQUIRES HAPPINESS. EVEN WITHOUT BEING GREGRACIOUS, IT IS EXTREMELY DIFFICULT TO BE (INDEPENDENT OR) MENTAL AND RATIONALLY ASSESSED WHEN YOU ARE ENCUMBERED WITH A PERSISTENTLY DEMANDING BODY, WHICH IS NOT YOU, BUT DETERMINES THE NATURE OF YOU’RE PERCEPTIONS. AS ALL PAIN AND PLEASURE ARE DESIGNED FOR THE BENEFIT OF YOUR BODY. ENVIRONMENTAL INDEPENDENCE AND UNRESTRICTED, SELECTIVE PERCEPTION ARE THE GREATEST ASSETS OF THE HIGHER BEINGS. MOREOVER, HAVING NO BODIES, THEY ACQUIRE NO REST, AND THEIR ABILITY TO INDUCT THEMSELVES INSTANTLY, TO THE CENTRE OF THE SUN PERHAPS, SEEM A DREAM. *(04) THE COMPLETE (ENVIRONMENTAL) INDEPENDENCE, UNRESTRICTED (SELECTIVE) PERCEPTION, AND THE ACCESS TO (UNLIMITED) NUCLEAR POWER MAKE THE HIGHER BEINGS IDEALLY SUITED FOR A VOCATION OF GUARDIANS OF JUSTICE AND THE TRUTH OR (THEIR BASIS) THE NATURAL LAWS. AN INDEPENDENT OR HIGHER HAPPINESS STABILIZES THIS. BUT WHAT MAKES THE HIGHER BEINGS PERFECT IS THEIR AMENABILITY TO RATIONALITY. WHICH MAKES THEM TOTALLY RELIABLE, EVEN IF NOT AS PREDICTABLE AS ONE WOULD WISH NEITHER PERCEPTION NOR PERCEPTION B (N.P.N.N.P) POTENTIALLY AND A FEATURE OF THE MOST / ADVANCED MENTAL BEINGS, WHICH ALMOST CAUSES THE CONSCIOUS THOUGHT PROCESS TO ‘RESONATE’ IN NEAR PERFECT RHYTHMICITY; WITH HAPPINESS GETTING TO BE IMPRESSIONED ON THE THOUGHT PROCESS RATHER THAN BY IT. HIGHER HAPPINESS IS THE RESULT OF MENTAL FLUCTUATION UNIFORMITY OR RHYTHMICITY*(01), BY MENTAL CONCENTRATION OR A FIXING OF THE THOUGHT OBJECT*(02). THIS SUSTAINED, INTENSE JOY, THOUGH EXCLUSIVELY, ‘MENTAL’, WAS ONCE WITHIN THE REACH OF THE MOST POTENTIALLY ADVANCED HUMANS OR - BODILY BEINGS*(03). HIGHER HAPPINESS IS THE ULTIMATE PRODUCT OF THE EVOLUTIONARY PROCESS OR CONDITIONED EXISTENCE. (HENCE IT IS ESSENTIAL THAT HIGHER HAPPINESS TOO BE REJECTED IF ONE IS ATTEMPTING TO DISCARD CONDITIONED EXISTENCE. SIMILARLY, THE DISCARDING OF DEPENDENT OR BODILY EXISTENCE SHOULD INCLUDE A REJECTION OF ITS CAUSE - THE BASIC PROCREATION JOY OR SEX URGE. ) *(01) ALTHOUGH THE CRITEREON OF HIGHER HAPPINESS IS A UNIFORMITY OF THE MENTAL FLUCTUATION ITS ONLY POSSIBLE MANIFESTATION IN CONDITIONED EXISTENCE IS AS A UNIFORMITY OF THE ENTIRE CONSCIOUS THOUGHT. AN ACHIEVEMENT DIRECTLY RELATED TO THE SPECIFIC MIND STRENGTH OF THE BODILY BEING; NOT SO MUCH TO EFFORT OF STRIVING FOR CONCENTRATION, OR CONCRETED INTENTION, WHICH IS REQUIRED MOSTLY TO MAINTAIN THE (ALREADY INDUCED) STATE. *(02) TO CONSIDER CONCRETED INTENTION AND MENTAL CONCENTRATION AS A ONE POINT MEDITATION’ MAY LEAD TO A MISUNDERSTANDING. THE WORD MEDITATION SHOULD MEAN THE STURDY OF REALITY; THAT’S ALL! AND MENTAL CONCENTRATION IS MERELY A FIXING OF THE MIND BY DESISTING ANY DISTRACTION - AN UNDIVIDED ATTENTION; RATHER LIKE HYPNOSIS (WHICH IS A SIMPLE UNDIVIDED ATTENTION - TO INSTRUCTION). *(03) THE MOST POTENTIALLY ADVANCED BODILY BEINGS ARE THUS PROVEN TO BE HUMANS WHOSE SPECIFIC MIND STRENGTH MUST HAVE BEEN THE MAXIMUM; TO HAVE FUNCTIONED AS INDEPENDENT (OR HIGHER) BEINGS. IT IS THE LOSS OF THIS SPECIFIC MIND STRENGTH TO HUMANS WHICH HAS PROVIDED THE PERFECT CLUE TO THE PARKING O CESSATION OF EVOLUTION BEING COUPLED WITH THE ONSET OF DEVOLUTION, WITHOUT A STATIC PHASE. HOWEVER, THE BASIC MIND STRENGTH OF ANY SPECIES REMAINS CONSTANT THROUGHOUT OF ANY SPECIES REMAINS CONSTANT THROUGHOUT EACH STAGE, DURING EVOLUTION OR DEVOLUTION. N.P.N.N.P IS ANOTHER INSTANCE OF A SIMPLIFIED INDICATION TO AN ABSTRUSE

B
2           PHENOMENON - OF REALITYFOR IT INDICATES THE NATURE OF THE PERMANENT, PERFECT HAPPINESS; WHERE PERCEPTION CASES AND INTENSIFIES HAPPINESS TO THE FULL, BY RESONATING WITH EACH FLUCTUATION AS THE ONLY RECEPTOR MANIFESTATION. (AS ONLY A HIGHER BEINGS CAN EXPERIENCE N.P.N.N.IT MUST ALSO BE LIKE HIGHER BEING THAT INITIALLY REALIZES THE GOAL TO BE THE BASIC STATE) PERMANENT HAPPINESS IS ACHIEVED BY DISCARDING THE ENTIRELY OF (SPECIFICALLY) CONDITIONED EXISTENCE OR, ITS MANIFESTATIONS - THE CONSCIOUS AND UNCONSCIOUS THOUGHT PROCESSES. BUT THE CHARACTER OF SUCH HAPPINESS REMAINS ESSENTIALLY RHYTHM CITY INDUCED - OF THE DYNAMICALLY FLUCTUATING NON-MATERIAL SPECKS OF THE UNIT’S RECEPTORS. THE MIND IS NOW IN PERFECT HARMONY OR RHYTHMCITY, DEVOID OF ALL THOUGHT PROCESSES - CONSCIOUS AND UNCONSCIOUS. BUT INITIALLY, IT WAS THE CONSCIOUS THOUGHT PROCESS WHICH GUIDED IT RECEPTOR FUNCTUATION TO ACHIEVING RHYTHMICITY INDUCED HAPPINESS, AS THE HAPPINESS, AS THE HIGHER OF CONDITIONED EXISTENCE. AND NOW, IT IS THE KNOWLEDGE PROVIDED BY THE CONSCIOUS THOUGHT PROCESS WHICH HAS DISCARDED ITSELF BRAHMIN OR ORIGINAL HINDU PHILOSOPHY AROSE (WAS CONDUCTED)

C
FROM THE FINDING OF THIS INDEPENDENT, RHYTHMCITY INDUCED (OR HIGHER) HAPPINESS; NOW OBVIOUSLY TO US EVEN THE ‘GOD MEN’ YEARN FOR DEPENDENT, BODILY BROUGHT ON HAPPINESS! THE ULTIMATE CLAIM NOW, OF ALL ‘MEDITATIONAL PROCEDURES’ IS RELIEF BY DIVISION, BUT NOT HAPPINESS. THE LOSS OF HIGHER HAPPINESS TO BODILY BEING IS THE FINEST INDICATION THAT COSMIC DEVOLUTION HAS COMMENCED; BUT THE HUMAN BEING SHOULD LAST PROBABLY AS LONG AS IT TOOK TO EVOLVE - A FEW MILLION YEARS - BEFORE DEVOLVING INTO SUB-HUMAN FORMS. THE WHOLE BUDDHIST PHILOSOPHY LEADS TO THE DISCOVERY OF (BY SYSTEMATIC ANALYSIS) THE PERMANENT, PERFECT STATE OF HAPPINESS;
C
2                                    AND URGES ONETO KEEP IN MIND THAT, TO HELP OTHERS BEST ONE MUST BE SURF OF ONESELF FIRST.*(01) *(01) by analyzing the present to comprehend the past, it has been possible to project the future. Then, by realizing the whole an ultimate has been postulated; the proof of which lies In its achievement - The Goal! ANGER USUALLY ARISES FROM A CONFRONTATION OF DOUBTS; AND FROM

C
AN E3      XPRESSION (OR EXPOSURE) OF ESTABLISHED WRONGS. SO THE BEST WAY TO AVOID SUCH CONFRONTATION, AS WELL AS SATISFY ONESELF, IS TO CLARIFY THE DOUBTS CRITICALLY - WITHIN ONE’S OWNSELF. THEN, THERE WOULD BE NO NECESSITY FOR CONFRONTATION; AND ONE WILL BE ABLE TO DERIVE AMPLE SATISFACTION (OF AN ESTABLISHED TRUTH) AS WELL! IF DOUBTS OF THE APPARENT ARE SUBSTITUTED BY THE DOUBTS OF REALITY; THE SATISFACTION DERIVED BY KNOWING THE TRUTH, WILL BE REPLACED BY THE JOY OF REALIZATION (OF THE TRUTH). THIS CRITICAL CLARIFICATION IS MEDITATION. (WHEN ONE IS BEGINNING SUCH CRITICAL CLARIFICATION OR MEDITATION, IT MAY BE FOUND USEFUL TO KEEP ONE’S MIND TETHERED, TO THE TICKING OF A CLOCK FOR INSTANCE, TO PREVENT IT WANDERING. FOR IF YOU BECOME MORE AWARE OF THE TICKING, YOU WOULD KNOW THAT MIND IS STARTING TO STRAY.)   VERY IMPORTANT   INTENTION (OR WILL) 47.B3 THERE ARE FOUR TYPES OF INTENTIONS. THE FIRST IS A SIMPLE INTENSION OR DESIRE (TO ACT). THE SECOND IS AN INTENTIONAL INTENTION - A DECISION (OF ACTING). THE THIRD IS A CONCERTED INTENSION, OR AN UNDIVIDED ATTENTION, AS FOR INSTANCE IN HYPNOSIS, WHICH AMOUNTS TO AN UNDIVIDED ATTENTION TO INSTRUCTION. CONCERTED INTENSION IS ACTUALLY A GROUP OF DECISION TO FIX THE MIND (AND CAN BE EXTENDED TO ACTIVATE PROTECTIVE RING OF RECPTORS) THE FOURTH AND FINAL IS THE MOST IMPORTANT AND THE LEAST KNOWN. THIS IS INGRAINED INTENTION; WHICH IS THE MULTIPLE ASSOCIATION OF FACTS OR NEEDS TO A CAUSE. A BACTERIUM TRANS FORMS ITSELF INSTINCTIVELY, BY WISH (MORETHAN WILL) OF INGRAINED INTENTION, BECAUSE OF A DESPERATE NEED TO SURVIVE. THIS IS ENTIRELY AN INDIVIDUAL EFFORT; UNLIKE NORMAL INSTINCTS, WHICH ARE SPECIES SPECIFIC, AND DO NOT REQUIRE ADESPERATE PLEA OR WISH FOR ACTIVATION. BIRDS FLY, FISH SWIM, AND WE WALK - INSTINCT!*(01) (ALTHOUGH YOU THINK YOUR WILL HAS ABSOLUTE CONTROL OVER YOURSELF, YOU OR YOUR MIND HAS ADOPTED SEVERAL SAFE GUARDS TO PREVENT DRASTIC ERRORS OF DECISION. INGRAINED INTENTION IS THE MOST SIGNIFICANT OF THESE; BECAUSE MULTIPLE ASSOCIATION OF FACTS OR NEEDS TO A CAUSE IS NECESSARY TO BRING ABOUT A REAL OR INNATE CHANGE TO YOUR SELF. BUT THE MOST IMPORTANT IS THE CONDITIONED CONSENSUS OR THE ABSOLUTENESS OF REALIZATION THAT ARE NECESSARY TO BRING ABOUT ANY ECCEPTIONAL UNIT CHANGES. IN OTHER WORDS, EXEPTIONAL UNIT CHANGES HAVE TO WHOLLY SATISFY EVERY BEING - INCLUDING HIGHER BEINGS. IT IS THE ABSOLUTENESS OF A REALIZATION THAT CAUSES ADJUSTMENT. ) *(INSTINCTS ARE INHERENTLY INGRAINED, SPECIES SPECIFIC, CONSTRUCTION SKILLS. THEY ARE INCOPERATED IN THE USE OF ALL TYPES OF MUSCLE ACTIVITY GENERALLY. INSTINCTS CAN ALSO BE CONSTITUTED SPECIFICALLY- AS ENTIRE ACTIONS. ALL THESE ARE SPECIES FUNCTIONS. HOWEVER, INSTINCTS CAN BE INDIVIDUAL TOO; AS IN NATURAL SELECTION EFFECTS. EVOLUTIONARY CHANGES ARE TIME-MARKED MUTATION)

D
‘SUFFER NIBBANA, IN THY HEART TO SINK. STUDY & DALLY NOT, THOU GOTAMID.’ By: Arahat Vajjiputta To: Ananda Thera “THESE TRUTHS, WHICH BEFORE I ONLY HEARD; I KNOW DWELL IN THEIR PERSONAL EXPERIENCE, AND HAVING PENETRATED THEM WITH INSIGHT, I NOW CAN DISCERN THEM.”   (Arahat Sariputta) “THE MINDS OF THOSE WHO KNOW THE UNCONDTIONED STATE ARE DELIVERED. THEY REALIZE THE TRUTHS ESSENCE, AND IN STILLNESS DELIGHTING, STEADFAST THEY ABANDON ALL DESIRES.” (THE BUDDHA) VERY IMPORTANT FOR DELIVERANCE, ONE MUST HAVE NO DESIRES FOR ANY FORM OF (CONDITIONED) EXISTENCE; NOR THE CONSISTENT NEED OF ANY PLEASURES OR ACTIVITIES - AS A WAY OF LIVING. THE ONLY DESIRE SHOULD BE FOR A PAIN-FREE NEUTRALITY, TILL ONE IS FREED TO REACH THE ULTIMATE - AT DEATH. (COMMENTARY)

48 A

“WHEN UNDERSTANDING IS COMPLETE, BELIEF MUST DISAPPEAR” (BUDDHA)

THE TRUTH IS ONE

IT’S RAMIFICATION SUBTLE,

ITS COMPREHENSION HUMANLY POSSIBLE, AND ITS VALUE LIMITLESS.

FAITH AND BELIEF OBSCURES IT

BELIEF CAN CAUSE EXACT ACTIONS, BUT THE UNDERSTANDING

IT PRODUCES IS ALWAYS INCOMPLETE AND OFTEN INSINCERE TOO

AND WITHOUT UNDERSTANDING THERE CAN BE NO INGRAINING INDIVIDUALITY,

OR SUCH ADDITION TO SPECIES CHARACTER. (A MUSLIM MAY ABIDE BY THE SHARIAH LAW,

BUT WITHOUT UNDERSTANDING WHY, HE MIGHT NOT BE ABLE TO SUPPORT IT FULLY - UNDER SCRUTINY.)

48, .A 2

THE SOLUTION

IF “EACH PERSON TAKES CHARGE OF HIS LIFE, WITH THE COURAGE TO CHANGE”

(BILL CLINTON - 27.10.92)

THEN, THERE WOULD BE NO THEISTS OR MATERIALISTS.

AND, AS REGARDS RIGHT AND WRONG: “IN MY ENTIRE LIFE,

I HAVE NOT COME ACROSS ANYONE WITH A STRONGER SENSE OF RIGHT AND WRONG, THAN MY WIFE” (BILL CLINTON - C.N.N. - 8.3.84)

The foundation of the TRUTH

My father Dr S. P. de Silva born in Sri Lanka in 1931 he was educated at trinity college kandy and excelled in all sports and was head prefect and vice captain cricket. He graduated from the Colombo medical college and after internship proceeded to England. He was a consultant in physical medicine (what is now called rheumatology) at Guys hospital London in the 1960’s. He gave up medicine and spent 39 years in the pursuit of the TRUTH. The truth being the understanding of the true nature of things. This is a scientific rationalization of Buddhism. The OPEN BOOK is all of his life s work in 50 verses. This transcends all boundaries of religion and is truly a cosmic formula to understand our purpose of existence. This is a life times work painstaking documented over time. It is my duty as a scientist and as his only child to share this with the world.

    Prof Arjuna P De Silva
Science of Buddhism

WITHOUT A HIGHER LIFE. *(04)

(NEITHER OF WHICH CAN REALLY BE ADJESTED TO A BODILY BEING; OWING TO THE

ENVIRONMENTAL DEPENDENCY OF THE MATERIAL BODY.)

*(01) HIGHER EVOLVED BEINGS HAVE COMPLETED EVOLUTION. IN OTHER WORDS, THEIR (MENTAL) RECEPTORS ARE FUNCTIONING AT MAXIMUM THRESHOLDS; ENABLING THEM TO INTENSIFY (ENVIRONMENTAL IMPRESSIONS) DIRECTLY AND LIVE INDEPENDENTLY. ALSO, WITH READY ACCES TO MENTAL MEMORY, IT IS VIRTUALLY IMPOSSIBLE FOR A HIGHER BEING TO THINK WRONG; EXCEPT, PERHAPS, IN METAPHYSICS. *(02) RHYTHMCITY INDUCED (OR HIGHER) HAPPINESS WAS A DISCOVERY OF THE BRAHMINS. THIS IN ITSELF PROVES THAT THE HUMANS ARE THE MOST EVOLVED BODILY BEINGS, FUNCTIONING JUST BELOW THE BASIC IND STRENGTHS WERE THE MAXIMUM. THIS HAS TO BE THE PREREQUISITE THAT COULD INFLUENCE THE BASIC MIND STRENGTH OF THESE INDIVIDUALS INTO BEING ACTIVATED AS A VARIANT, WHEN THEY WERE STRIVING FOR HIGHER HAPPINESS. (THIS ALMOST IDENTICAL TO THE WAY IN WHICH THE RESERVE RECEPTOR PLANES ARE RECRUITED IN HIGHER BEINGS WITH MAXIMUM SPECIFIC MIND STRENGTHS, TO INCREASE RHYTHMICITY AND INTENSITY OF HAPPINESS. ) *(03) A HIGHER EVOLVED LIFE MEANS BEING TRULY INDEPENDENT, OR BEING ABLE TO THINK AND FUNCTION WITHOUT BODILY BIAS. THIS AMOUNTS TO BEING RATIONALLY ASSESSED ALWAYS - IN ONE’S ROUTINE LIVING (OR A VOCATION) AND THE WAY BY WHICH ONE ACQUIRES HAPPINESS. EVEN WITHOUT BEING GREGRACIOUS, IT IS EXTREMELY DIFFICULT TO BE (INDEPENDENT OR) MENTAL AND RATIONALLY ASSESSED WHEN YOU ARE ENCUMBERED WITH A PERSISTENTLY DEMANDING BODY, WHICH IS NOT YOU, BUT DETERMINES THE NATURE OF YOU’RE PERCEPTIONS. AS ALL PAIN AND PLEASURE ARE DESIGNED FOR THE BENEFIT OF YOUR BODY. ENVIRONMENTAL INDEPENDENCE AND UNRESTRICTED, SELECTIVE PERCEPTION ARE THE GREATEST ASSETS OF THE HIGHER BEINGS. MOREOVER, HAVING NO BODIES, THEY ACQUIRE NO REST, AND THEIR ABILITY TO INDUCT THEMSELVES INSTANTLY, TO THE CENTRE OF THE SUN PERHAPS, SEEM A DREAM. *(04) THE COMPLETE (ENVIRONMENTAL) INDEPENDENCE, UNRESTRICTED (SELECTIVE) PERCEPTION, AND THE ACCESS TO (UNLIMITED) NUCLEAR POWER MAKE THE HIGHER BEINGS IDEALLY SUITED FOR A VOCATION OF GUARDIANS OF JUSTICE AND THE TRUTH OR (THEIR BASIS) THE NATURAL LAWS. AN INDEPENDENT OR HIGHER HAPPINESS STABILIZES THIS. BUT WHAT MAKES THE HIGHER BEINGS PERFECT IS THEIR AMENABILITY TO RATIONALITY. WHICH MAKES THEM TOTALLY RELIABLE, EVEN IF NOT AS PREDICTABLE AS ONE WOULD WISH NEITHER PERCEPTION NOR PERCEPTION B (N.P.N.N.P) POTENTIALLY AND A FEATURE OF THE MOST / ADVANCED MENTAL BEINGS, WHICH ALMOST CAUSES THE CONSCIOUS THOUGHT PROCESS TO ‘RESONATE’ IN NEAR PERFECT RHYTHMICITY; WITH HAPPINESS GETTING TO BE IMPRESSIONED ON THE THOUGHT PROCESS RATHER THAN BY IT. HIGHER HAPPINESS IS THE RESULT OF MENTAL FLUCTUATION UNIFORMITY OR RHYTHMICITY*(01), BY MENTAL CONCENTRATION OR A FIXING OF THE THOUGHT OBJECT*(02). THIS SUSTAINED, INTENSE JOY, THOUGH EXCLUSIVELY, ‘MENTAL’, WAS ONCE WITHIN THE REACH OF THE MOST POTENTIALLY ADVANCED HUMANS OR - BODILY BEINGS*(03). HIGHER HAPPINESS IS THE ULTIMATE PRODUCT OF THE EVOLUTIONARY PROCESS OR CONDITIONED EXISTENCE. (HENCE IT IS ESSENTIAL THAT HIGHER HAPPINESS TOO BE REJECTED IF ONE IS ATTEMPTING TO DISCARD CONDITIONED EXISTENCE. SIMILARLY, THE DISCARDING OF DEPENDENT OR BODILY EXISTENCE SHOULD INCLUDE A REJECTION OF ITS CAUSE - THE BASIC PROCREATION JOY OR SEX URGE. ) *(01) ALTHOUGH THE CRITEREON OF HIGHER HAPPINESS IS A UNIFORMITY OF THE MENTAL FLUCTUATION ITS ONLY POSSIBLE MANIFESTATION IN CONDITIONED EXISTENCE IS AS A UNIFORMITY OF THE ENTIRE CONSCIOUS THOUGHT. AN ACHIEVEMENT DIRECTLY RELATED TO THE SPECIFIC MIND STRENGTH OF THE BODILY BEING; NOT SO MUCH TO EFFORT OF STRIVING FOR CONCENTRATION, OR CONCRETED INTENTION, WHICH IS REQUIRED MOSTLY TO MAINTAIN THE (ALREADY INDUCED) STATE. *(02) TO CONSIDER CONCRETED INTENTION AND MENTAL CONCENTRATION AS A ONE POINT MEDITATION’ MAY LEAD TO A MISUNDERSTANDING. THE WORD MEDITATION SHOULD MEAN THE STURDY OF REALITY; THAT’S ALL! AND MENTAL CONCENTRATION IS MERELY A FIXING OF THE MIND BY DESISTING ANY DISTRACTION - AN UNDIVIDED ATTENTION; RATHER LIKE HYPNOSIS (WHICH IS A SIMPLE UNDIVIDED ATTENTION - TO INSTRUCTION). *(03) THE MOST POTENTIALLY ADVANCED BODILY BEINGS ARE THUS PROVEN TO BE HUMANS WHOSE SPECIFIC MIND STRENGTH MUST HAVE BEEN THE MAXIMUM; TO HAVE FUNCTIONED AS INDEPENDENT (OR HIGHER) BEINGS. IT IS THE LOSS OF THIS SPECIFIC MIND STRENGTH TO HUMANS WHICH HAS PROVIDED THE PERFECT CLUE TO THE PARKING O CESSATION OF EVOLUTION BEING COUPLED WITH THE ONSET OF DEVOLUTION, WITHOUT A STATIC PHASE. HOWEVER, THE BASIC MIND STRENGTH OF ANY SPECIES REMAINS CONSTANT THROUGHOUT OF ANY SPECIES REMAINS CONSTANT THROUGHOUT EACH STAGE, DURING EVOLUTION OR DEVOLUTION. N.P.N.N.P IS ANOTHER INSTANCE OF A SIMPLIFIED INDICATION TO AN ABSTRUSE

B
2           PHENOMENON - OF REALITYFOR IT INDICATES THE NATURE OF THE PERMANENT, PERFECT HAPPINESS; WHERE PERCEPTION CASES AND INTENSIFIES HAPPINESS TO THE FULL, BY RESONATING WITH EACH FLUCTUATION AS THE ONLY RECEPTOR MANIFESTATION. (AS ONLY A HIGHER BEINGS CAN EXPERIENCE N.P.N.N.IT MUST ALSO BE LIKE HIGHER BEING THAT INITIALLY REALIZES THE GOAL TO BE THE BASIC STATE) PERMANENT HAPPINESS IS ACHIEVED BY DISCARDING THE ENTIRELY OF (SPECIFICALLY) CONDITIONED EXISTENCE OR, ITS MANIFESTATIONS - THE CONSCIOUS AND UNCONSCIOUS THOUGHT PROCESSES. BUT THE CHARACTER OF SUCH HAPPINESS REMAINS ESSENTIALLY RHYTHM CITY INDUCED - OF THE DYNAMICALLY FLUCTUATING NON-MATERIAL SPECKS OF THE UNIT’S RECEPTORS. THE MIND IS NOW IN PERFECT HARMONY OR RHYTHMCITY, DEVOID OF ALL THOUGHT PROCESSES - CONSCIOUS AND UNCONSCIOUS. BUT INITIALLY, IT WAS THE CONSCIOUS THOUGHT PROCESS WHICH GUIDED IT RECEPTOR FUNCTUATION TO ACHIEVING RHYTHMICITY INDUCED HAPPINESS, AS THE HAPPINESS, AS THE HIGHER OF CONDITIONED EXISTENCE. AND NOW, IT IS THE KNOWLEDGE PROVIDED BY THE CONSCIOUS THOUGHT PROCESS WHICH HAS DISCARDED ITSELF BRAHMIN OR ORIGINAL HINDU PHILOSOPHY AROSE (WAS CONDUCTED)

C
FROM THE FINDING OF THIS INDEPENDENT, RHYTHMCITY INDUCED (OR HIGHER) HAPPINESS; NOW OBVIOUSLY TO US EVEN THE ‘GOD MEN’ YEARN FOR DEPENDENT, BODILY BROUGHT ON HAPPINESS! THE ULTIMATE CLAIM NOW, OF ALL ‘MEDITATIONAL PROCEDURES’ IS RELIEF BY DIVISION, BUT NOT HAPPINESS. THE LOSS OF HIGHER HAPPINESS TO BODILY BEING IS THE FINEST INDICATION THAT COSMIC DEVOLUTION HAS COMMENCED; BUT THE HUMAN BEING SHOULD LAST PROBABLY AS LONG AS IT TOOK TO EVOLVE - A FEW MILLION YEARS - BEFORE DEVOLVING INTO SUB-HUMAN FORMS. THE WHOLE BUDDHIST PHILOSOPHY LEADS TO THE DISCOVERY OF (BY SYSTEMATIC ANALYSIS) THE PERMANENT, PERFECT STATE OF HAPPINESS;
C
2                                    AND URGES ONETO KEEP IN MIND THAT, TO HELP OTHERS BEST ONE MUST BE SURF OF ONESELF FIRST.*(01) *(01) by analyzing the present to comprehend the past, it has been possible to project the future. Then, by realizing the whole an ultimate has been postulated; the proof of which lies In its achievement - The Goal! ANGER USUALLY ARISES FROM A CONFRONTATION OF DOUBTS; AND FROM

C
AN E3      XPRESSION (OR EXPOSURE) OF ESTABLISHED WRONGS. SO THE BEST WAY TO AVOID SUCH CONFRONTATION, AS WELL AS SATISFY ONESELF, IS TO CLARIFY THE DOUBTS CRITICALLY - WITHIN ONE’S OWNSELF. THEN, THERE WOULD BE NO NECESSITY FOR CONFRONTATION; AND ONE WILL BE ABLE TO DERIVE AMPLE SATISFACTION (OF AN ESTABLISHED TRUTH) AS WELL! IF DOUBTS OF THE APPARENT ARE SUBSTITUTED BY THE DOUBTS OF REALITY; THE SATISFACTION DERIVED BY KNOWING THE TRUTH, WILL BE REPLACED BY THE JOY OF REALIZATION (OF THE TRUTH). THIS CRITICAL CLARIFICATION IS MEDITATION. (WHEN ONE IS BEGINNING SUCH CRITICAL CLARIFICATION OR MEDITATION, IT MAY BE FOUND USEFUL TO KEEP ONE’S MIND TETHERED, TO THE TICKING OF A CLOCK FOR INSTANCE, TO PREVENT IT WANDERING. FOR IF YOU BECOME MORE AWARE OF THE TICKING, YOU WOULD KNOW THAT MIND IS STARTING TO STRAY.)   VERY IMPORTANT   INTENTION (OR WILL) 47.B3 THERE ARE FOUR TYPES OF INTENTIONS. THE FIRST IS A SIMPLE INTENSION OR DESIRE (TO ACT). THE SECOND IS AN INTENTIONAL INTENTION - A DECISION (OF ACTING). THE THIRD IS A CONCERTED INTENSION, OR AN UNDIVIDED ATTENTION, AS FOR INSTANCE IN HYPNOSIS, WHICH AMOUNTS TO AN UNDIVIDED ATTENTION TO INSTRUCTION. CONCERTED INTENSION IS ACTUALLY A GROUP OF DECISION TO FIX THE MIND (AND CAN BE EXTENDED TO ACTIVATE PROTECTIVE RING OF RECPTORS) THE FOURTH AND FINAL IS THE MOST IMPORTANT AND THE LEAST KNOWN. THIS IS INGRAINED INTENTION; WHICH IS THE MULTIPLE ASSOCIATION OF FACTS OR NEEDS TO A CAUSE. A BACTERIUM TRANS FORMS ITSELF INSTINCTIVELY, BY WISH (MORETHAN WILL) OF INGRAINED INTENTION, BECAUSE OF A DESPERATE NEED TO SURVIVE. THIS IS ENTIRELY AN INDIVIDUAL EFFORT; UNLIKE NORMAL INSTINCTS, WHICH ARE SPECIES SPECIFIC, AND DO NOT REQUIRE ADESPERATE PLEA OR WISH FOR ACTIVATION. BIRDS FLY, FISH SWIM, AND WE WALK - INSTINCT!*(01) (ALTHOUGH YOU THINK YOUR WILL HAS ABSOLUTE CONTROL OVER YOURSELF, YOU OR YOUR MIND HAS ADOPTED SEVERAL SAFE GUARDS TO PREVENT DRASTIC ERRORS OF DECISION. INGRAINED INTENTION IS THE MOST SIGNIFICANT OF THESE; BECAUSE MULTIPLE ASSOCIATION OF FACTS OR NEEDS TO A CAUSE IS NECESSARY TO BRING ABOUT A REAL OR INNATE CHANGE TO YOUR SELF. BUT THE MOST IMPORTANT IS THE CONDITIONED CONSENSUS OR THE ABSOLUTENESS OF REALIZATION THAT ARE NECESSARY TO BRING ABOUT ANY ECCEPTIONAL UNIT CHANGES. IN OTHER WORDS, EXEPTIONAL UNIT CHANGES HAVE TO WHOLLY SATISFY EVERY BEING - INCLUDING HIGHER BEINGS. IT IS THE ABSOLUTENESS OF A REALIZATION THAT CAUSES ADJUSTMENT. ) *(INSTINCTS ARE INHERENTLY INGRAINED, SPECIES SPECIFIC, CONSTRUCTION SKILLS. THEY ARE INCOPERATED IN THE USE OF ALL TYPES OF MUSCLE ACTIVITY GENERALLY. INSTINCTS CAN ALSO BE CONSTITUTED SPECIFICALLY- AS ENTIRE ACTIONS. ALL THESE ARE SPECIES FUNCTIONS. HOWEVER, INSTINCTS CAN BE INDIVIDUAL TOO; AS IN NATURAL SELECTION EFFECTS. EVOLUTIONARY CHANGES ARE TIME-MARKED MUTATION)

D

THE ONLY DESIRE SHOULD BE FOR A PAIN-FREE NEUTRALITY, TILL ONE IS FREED TO REACH THE ULTIMATE - AT DEATH. (COMMENTARY)

THE BUDDHA’S TEACHING

THE WAY THE BUDDHA DID IT

*Mindfulness is a constant mental alert for experiences

1. A B C D
(A) WHAT IS HAPPINESS? It is an imprisoned*(01) (conscious) state of the mind*(02) IS THERE ANYTHING ELSE REQUIRED? No! Every action or requirement of every being (man or microbe) is with the want of happiness; IS THEN A PERMANENT STATE OF HAPPINESS*(03) AN EFFORTLESS SATISFACTION*(04) THE ONLY ANSWER? Yes; if any change means a reduction of the happiness. And no further increase of happiness is possible! *(05) *(01). CONSCIOUSNESS CAN BE A MENTAL IMPRESSIONING AS IN PERCEPTION AND FEELING, OR A MENTAL EXPRESSING AS IN DESIRE AND INTENTION. TOGETHER, THEY CONSTITUTE THE CONSCIOUS THOUGHT PROCESS OF THE LIVING BEING.   1. DS ELECTRO - MAGNETIC INDUCTION*(01)
THE MAGNETON IS CONSTITUTED PRIMARILY AS THE EARTH’S MAGNETIC FIELD; WITHOUT WHICH THERE COULD BE NO SECONDARY MAGNETIC PHENOMENA. WHEN ELECTRICITY IS CONDUCTED IN A WIRE, IT AFFECTS THE ESTABLISHED EARTH’S MAGNETIC FIELD, THAT IS ALREADY POSITIONED IN THE WIRE.*(02) IN OVERCOMING THIS (MAGNETIC) RESISTENCE, SOME OF THE (CONDUCTED) ELECTRONS GIVE UP THE ENERGY WHICH IS BEING CARRIED. THE RELEASED ENERGY IS ABSORBED BY MAGNETONS TO CREATE A FORCE-FIELD AROUND THE WIRE. THIS MAGNETIC FORCE FIELD TENDS TO OPPOSE THE FLOW OF ELECTRONS, BY PUSHING THE WIRE AWAY, AND HENCE RESTORING THE EARTH’S MAGNETIC FIELD. A PUSHING THE WIRE AWAY, AND HENCE RESTORING THE EARTH’S MAGNETIC FIELD. A POWERFUL ELECTRO - MAGNET CAN REPLACE (IN TRUTH IT CAN ONLY REINFORCE) THE EARTH’S FIELD, AND THE PHENOMENON OF OPPOSING A CHANGE TO AN ESTABLISHED MAGNETIC FIELD*(03), CAN BE MADE USE OF TO CAUSE MOVEMENT, OR BE CONVERTED TO ELECTRICITY AND (MECHANICAL) MOVEMENT. ALL THESE ARE SECONDARY MAGNETIC PHENOMENA; AND HAVE TO FUNCTION IN UNION WITH THE EARTH’S FIELD. IN OTHER WORDS, THE EARTH’S SPIN IS TRANSMITTED ONLY FOR GRAVITATION, AND THE EARTH’S MAGNETIC FIELD. *(01). ANY INSTANT INDUCTION (MAGNETIC, MECHANICAL OR MENTAL) IS IN STRAIGHT LINES. HENCE THE CHANGES IN DIRECTION HAS TO TAKE PLACE IN STAGES - AS TANGENTIAL TRANSMISSIONS. *(02).THERE ARE NO FREE ELECTRONS (LIKE PHOTONS OR MAGNETONS); SO ANY ELECTRONS CONDUCTED IN ELECTRICITY ARE FROM ATOM ATOM. IT IS THESE ATOMIC REACTIONS THAT AFFECT THE MAGNETIC FIELD TOO. (THE PHOTON IS NOT CONSTITUTED LIKE THE MAGNETON; AND IS NOT AFFECTED BY ELECTRICITY.) *(03).THE OPPOSITION TO CHANGE IS ONLY MOMENTARY; TILL THE CHANGE ITSELF GETS ESTABLISHED; THEN IT RESISTS ANY CHANGE. THIS STRANGE PHENOMENON (LIKE IS CLOSELY ALLIED TO ONE OF GRAVITY, IN THEIR PURPOSE OF MAINTAINING MATERIAL (MOLECULAR0 CHOESION. BOTH OF WHICH FUNCTION JOINTLY, BY AN INDUCTION OF THEIR ENERGIES; TO KEEP ANY WHIRLING SPACE OBJECT (LIKE THE EARTH OR A STAR) TOGETHER.) *(04). IN THIS PRODUCTION OF ELECTRICITY THE CHANGE TO A MAGNETIC FIELD IS BROUGHT ABOUT BY THE ‘PUSH’ ‘PULL’ EFFECTS OF A COIL. THE MECHANICAL ENERGY USED IS CONVERTED TO MAGNETISM, AND THE MAGNETISM ITSELF TO ELECTRICITY-AS IN A DYNAMO. ARE VERSE (MOTOR) EFFECT CAN BE CAUSED IF THE MAGNETIZATION IS MADE INTO SEGMENTS OF A CIRCLE. THEN THE ‘PUSH’ ‘PULL’ EFFECTS AT THE CENTRE CAN BE MADE USE OF ME CYNICALLY, INTO ROTATING A FAN FOR INSTANCE.
  1. D6 VERY IMPORTANT STATIC ELECTRICITY*
CERTAIN ATOMS CAN ACQUIRE EXTRA ELECTRONS IN THEIR OUTER ORBITS, AS A PHENOMENON AND NOT JUST A PART OF A CHEMICAL REACTION. THESE EXTRA ELECTRONS, CAN BE DISCHARGED. BUT SUCH ATOMS CAN SOON ACQUIRE THEM AGAIN. THIS IS STATIC ELECTRICITY. AN ELECTRON CAN BE AN ELECTRON, ONLY IN AN ATOM! ALSO, THERE ARE NO POSITIVE AND NEGATIVE CHARGES OF ELECTRICITY; JUST AN EXCESS OR DEFICIT OF ELECTRONS - IN AN ATOM.*(02) HOW EVER, THERE ARE POSITIVE AND NEGATIVE CHARGERS IN MAGNETISM; AS NORTH AND SOUTH SEEKING PARTICLES. SCIENCE WOULD BE FARLESS CONFOUNDING IF ONE ALWAYS LOOKS FOR NATURE’S PURPOSE WHY IS IT SO? MAGNETISM, FOR INSTANCE, IS MORE CLOSELY ALIGNED TO GRAVITY THAN TO ELECTRICITY. SINCE BOTH MAGNETISM (MAGNETON ENERGY) AND GRAVITY ARE DERIVED FROM THE EARTH’S SPIN; WITH MAGNETISM REINFORCING GRAVITY FOR A SPHEROIDAL, MATERIAL CHOESION*(03)    *(01). THE ATOMS CONSTITUTING A COPPER WIRE THAT CONDUCT ELECTRICITY ARE QUITE CONTENT TO STAY AS THEY ARE; UNTIL THEY HAVE TO CONDUCT A LOAD OF ELECTRONS IN THEIR OUTER ORBITS - AS A (SERIES) CHEMICAL REACTION. HOWEVER, IT IS QUITE DIFFERENT WITH CERTAIN ATOMS LIKE SILICON WHICH HAVE AN AFFINITY FOR EXTRA ELECTRONS - AS STATIC ELECTRICITY; THOUGH THEY GET RID OF THEM (BY DISCHARGING) AND THEN ACQUIRE THEM A NEW. THESE ATOMS ACQUIRE THE EXTRA ELECTRONS DUE TO AFFINITY, AND DISCHARGE THEM FOR STABILITY. A HEATED CATHODE, AS OFTEN SEEN, CAN PRODUCE A STREAM OF ATOMS WITH EXCESS ELECTRONS IN THEIR OUTER ORBITS; WHICH WILL DIRECTLY MOVE TOWARDS ANODAL ATOMS WITH A RELATIVE DEFICIT OF ELECTRONS. THIS IS A CHEMICAL REACTION CAUSING A TRANSFER OF ELECTRONS; AND NOT A TYPICAL ELECTROCHEMICAL REACTION THAT SHARES (OR FIXES) IT’S ELECTRONS. IT IS ALSO UNLIKE A LASER BEAM, FOR INSTANCE; WHICH IS AN ESTABLISHED PHOTON (ELECTROMAGNETIC) WAVE FORM. SO THERE IS STATIC ELECTRICITY, CONDUCTED ELECTRICITY, AND EVEN CONVICTED ELECTRICITY - ALL AS ATOMS: NO FREE ELECTRONS. SPARKING ELECTRICITY - FROM STATIC CRACKLING TO ATMOSPHERIC LIGHTING - IS ATOMS DISCHARGING THE ENERGIES OF EXCESS ELECTRONS FOR CHEMICAL (STABILITY OR) EQUILIBRIUM.  AND, THOUGH IT IS THOUGHT THAT ONLY MOLECULES MOVE; THERE IS CONSIDERABLE MOVEMENT OF ATOMS TOO; IN TRYING TO GAIN (CHEMICAL) EQUILIBRIUM, BY FIXING, FREEING OR TRANSFERRING ELECTRONS. *(ALL CELESTIAL BODIES ARE SPHEROIDAL, AS THEY MAINTAINED THIS WAY BY GRAVITY AND MAGNETISM - A COMBINATION OF HORIZONTAL AND VERTICAL HOLDS. IF FOR INSTANCE THE EARTH WAS HELD BY GRAVITY ALONE, IT WOULD BE ELECTRICAL LIKE THE EYE OF A WHIRL POOLING TORNADO. THE EFFECT OF MAGNETISM IS NOT AS WIDESPREAD GRAVITY. IT IS A RATHER LOCALIZED MOULDING FORCE. HOWEVER, THE POLES OR ENDS HAVE MORE MAGNETISM AND LESS GRAVITY.... THE ACCELERATION DUE TO GRAVITY IS UNIFORM, BECAUSE THE ENERGY IS INDUCTED. IN INDUCTION THERE IS NO POSSIBILITY OF ANY ENERGY LOSS, AS IS USUAL IN CONDUCTED ENERGY; THE ACCELERATION IN A WHIRLING TORNADO IS FAR FROM UNIFORM! THE PHENOMENON OF GRAVITY CAN BE OBSERVED IN ANY WHIRL POOLING FORCE. BUT THE INCORPORATION OF A MAGNETIC FORCE OR FIELD IS UNIQUE, AND OCCURS ONLY WHEN INORGANIC MATTER IS FORMED FROM PRIMARY MATTER, BY A WHIRL POOLING OF INDUCTED ENERGY. (THE GREATEST MAGNETIC FIELD WOULD HAVE BEEN AROUND THE ‘BIG-BANG UNIT!’)
  1. D7 VERY IMPORTANT ORGANIC MATTER
THE PRODUCTION OF ORGANIC MATTER IS A GENETIC PHENOMENON. THE CHLOROPHYLL IN PLANTS MERELY FIX THE SUN’S ENERGY IN THE COMPOUNDED CARBON ATOMS OF BASIC ORGANIC MATTER. THE STRUCTURE OF ORGANIC MATTER IS THE COMPOUNDED CARBON ATOM RING; WHICH CONSTITUTE SIX CARBON ATOMS. THIS ENABLES EACH CARBON ATOMS TO BE FIXED TO TWO OTHERS; AND ‘FREES’ TWO OF ITS ELECTRONS TO ACQUIRE AND RELEASE ENERGY, WITHOUT ANY DESTABILIZING EFFECTS ON THE NUCLEUS. THIS IS THE ENERGY OF ORGANIC MATTER; WHICH CAN BE ACQUIRED AND RELEASED PRECISELY - GENETICALLY! TWO ELECTRONS OF EACH   CARBON ATOM IN A COMPOUNDED RING ARE NOT FREED (OF THEIR NUCLEAR BONDING) AND ARE ONLY ABLE TO REACT ELECTROCHEMICALLY OR INORGANICALLY. IT IS THESE REACTIONS THAT TRIGGER THE RELEASE OF ENERGY, BUT MAY INCOMPLETELY BREAK UP THE CARBON ATOM RING INTO HYDROCARBONS; WHICH IS THE LINK BETWEEN ORGANIC AND INORGANIC MATTER. ANY MECHANICAL ENERGY, ASSOCIATED WITH INORGANIC MATTER, CANNOT BE STORED PURPOSIVELY; TO BE MADE AVAILABLE PRECISELY. ELECTROCHEMICAL REACTIONS CAN DO THIS. BUT IS MOSTLY UNSUITED FOR CELLULAR ACTIVITY. (CELLS DIE WITHOUT OXYGEN, AS THE ORGANIC REACTIONS TRIGGERING THE RE LEASE OF ENERGY, FAIL TO OCCUR WITHOUT OXYGEN IN THE PROCESS OF RELEASING ENERGY, A MOLECULE OF GLUCOSE BREAK DOWN COMPLETELY TO CARBON DIOXIDE AND WATER. MOST CARBOHYDRATES FUNCTION THIS WAY, AND CONSTITUTE THE BASIC SOURCE OF ENERGY OF BOTH ANIMALS AND PLANTS. FATS CANNOT DO THIS, AND USUALLY BREAK UP INCOMPLETELY INTO HYDROCARBONS ANAEROBIC ORGANISMS RELEASE ENERGY WITHOUT OXYGEN.)
  1. D8 THE NEUTRONS OF THE NUCLEUS (OF AN ATOM)
THE FUNCTION THE NEUTRONS IS ESSENTIALLY ONE OF BINDING - THE PROTONS! THIS IS MUCH LIKE THE WAY HEAT BINDS THE ABSTRACT ENERGIES OF SOLIDITY, FLUIDITY AND GASEITY IN A SUB-ATOMIC PARTICLE. BUT SOME NUCLEI ALSO SEEM TO HAVE AN IDIOSYNCRASY OR AFFINITY FOR EXTRA NEUTRONS - JUST LIKE STATIC ELECTRICITY. AND, SIMILAR TO STATIC ELECTRICITY, THE EXCESS NEUTRONS TOO HAVE TO BE DISCHARGED - FOR STABILITY. SO THERE COULD BE NO LARGE SCALE STORING OF NEUTRON ENERGY, AS A HUGE EXPLOSIVE DEVISE. THE PARALLEL IS THE POSSIBILITY OF EXPLOSIVE POWER LIGHTNING! IF THE NUCLEUS CANNOT DISCHARGE NEUTRONS, THERE WILL BE NO ABSORPTION. RELEASE OF ENERGY, BY FISSION OR FUSION, ULTIMATELY AMOUNTS TO THE RELEASE OF ISOTOPE NEUTRON ENERGY! THOUGH COMPLETE DISINTEGRATION OF THE ATOM BY DIRECT NUCLEAR DESTABILIZATION IS ALWAYS POSSIBLE.

THE BUDDHA’S SCIENTIFIC DISCOVERIES

THE BUDDHA’S DISCOVERY OF THE MIND WAS MOSTLY A FUNCTIONAL PROCESS - THE CONSCIOUS AND UNCONSCIOUS THOUGHT PROCESS. THESE COULD BE CONSIDERED AS THE MIND’S “PHYSIOLOGY.” WE NOW HAVE TO COMPLETE ITS “ANATOMICAL” CONSTRUCTION. NONE OF THIS WOULD HAVE BEEN POSSIBLE WITHOUT THE BUDDHA’S AWARENESS OF THE MIND’S INHERENT DYNAMICITY OR FLUCTUATIONS. IT IS THIS VITAL INSIGHT THAT ENABLES ONE TO TRULY UNDERSTAND THE ENTIRETY OF THE MIND - OR ONE’S OWN SELF. THE BUDDHA’S VIEWS ON ORGANIC MATTER WERE VERY BASIC; BUT VERY IMPOTENT. WE, OF COURSE, HAVE THE PRIMORDIAL PROTOTYPE CELL (OR THE BASIC LIFE CELL....... BEINGS) KNOWLEDGE. IT IS HERE THAT THE BUDDHA’S INTERPRETATION OF THE MIND, HELPS US WITH, HOW THE GENES GOT THERE KNOW- HOW! THE BUDDHA HAS DELVED LITTLE INTO NUCLEAR-PHYSICS AND THE CONSTITUTION OF PRIMARY MATTER. NEITHER HAS THERE BEEN ANY ELABORATION ON THE CONSTRUCTION OF ELEMENTS. BUT THE BUDDHA SEEMS TO HAVE A REMARKABLE DISCOVERY ABOUT MATTER AS A WHOLE: THAT HEAT IS ACTUALLY A CONSTITUENT OF MATTER (ALONG WIT SOLIDITY, FLUIDITY AND GASEITY) AND NOT A FORM OF ENERGY. THIS APPEARS TO BE CORRECT. AN INSIGHT PERHAPS!

THE VIRTUE OF PATIENCE IS NOT TO ENDURE AN (UNPLEASANT) EFFECT, BUT

TO INVESTIGATE IT S CAUSE - BEFORE REACTING AND TOLERANCE IS THE ABILITY TO MODIFY THE ENSUING REACTION APPROPRIATELY.*(1) PAIN: PAUSE *(2): CAUSE*(3): THEN COURSE!

  *(01) Frequent irritation and even anger arising out of an incompatible association, should be analyzed and recognized as a state of dislike, requiring dissociation with no further contact; until some consensus is established. This is a Rational Justice. But, Patience (and Tolerance) is the only way of converting others’ experiences (and responses) into one’s own knowledge. Pride and its counterpart, of feeling inferior, are the main obstacles to accommodating for such knowledge. *(02) Pain must always be assessed in its proper perspective; and not permitted to be magnified because one’s “Pride has been hurt” - too! (Disparaging do not slur one’s dignity.) *(03) When in persistent pain and things are repeatedly going wrong, it is imperative to find out whether you are an “Incidental”  who is simply being used, or a person being “induced” into correction; or whether the happenings are purely “accidental” and can be corrected routinely. The solution for the “induced” is to realize, Rejection and rectify - the wrong. The solution for the ‘Incidental’ is to realize, Justify ad Accept - True values, to reality. Even an animal will look for alternatives, if routine efforts are of no avail.

SO A HUMANENESS, OR A PRACTICALLY MEANINGFUL COMPASSION, IS NECESSARY TOWARDS SUBHUMAN FORMS-THE UNFORTUNATES.

BUT ALAS, COMPASSION SEEMS CONFINED TO THOSE THAT BLEED AND SCREAM. THE SILENT SUFFERERS LIKE THE EVOLUTIONARY ADVANCED FLOWERING PLANTS HAVE BEEN IGNORED.

IF TAKE LIFE, AS YOU MUST,*(1) BE IT FOR REAL CONCERN,*(2) NEVER FOR ANY THRILL OUT OF SUCH A SOJOURN.

KILLING A CARROT*(3) FOR FOOD RATHER THAN A COW, DOES SEEM VIRTUOUS. BUT IS THE LIFE OF ONE COW OR THOSE OF A HUNDRED CARROTS MORE SIGNIFICANT? HENCE, VEGETARIANISM IS NOT SYNONYMOUS WITH VIRTUE; BUT A PRACTICAL COMPASSION OR MEANINGFUL MORALITY IS SO.I.E KILLING FOR MAXIMUM UTILIZATION, WITH MINIMUM SUFFERING.

*(01) Cattle reared for slaughter are ensured a relatively satisfactory life prior to their death. This applies even for lambs. But, the same cannot be sad for cooped up chickens; who lead a truly pathetic (cruel) existence. Killing a wild duck though, can bring howls of protest. *(02) 1. To protect - from harmful organisms.
  1. To Preserve: Let hunger be your guide to food;
Let nutrition be your guide to hunger;      Let flavor be your guide to nutrition;      and, Let compassion be your guide to r. And   3. To Progress: A peaceful, placid, pleasant environment, for intellectual advancement. *(03) A potato plant is harvested at the end of its life-span, for the nutrition it has stored for the next generation - similar to The yolk in a hen’s egg. The foundation of the TRUTH

My father Dr SP de Silva born in Sri Lanka in 1931 he was educated at trinity college kandy and excelled in all sports and was head prefect and vice captain cricket. He graduated from the Colombo medical college and after internship proceeded to England. He was a consultant in physical medicine (what is now called rheumatology) at Guys hospital London in the 1960’s. He gave up medicine and spent 39 years in the pursuit of the TRUTH. The truth being the understanding of the true nature of things. This is a scientific rationalization of Buddhism. The OPEN BOOK is all of his life s work in 50 verses. This transcends all boundaries of religion and is truly a cosmic formula to understand our purpose of existence. This is a life times work painstaking documented over time. It is my duty as a scientist and as his only child to share this with the world.

    Prof Arjuna P De Silva
